author: Anita Rapaport
text:
Great Bones, But Service Needs to Catch Up

Reviewed after a 5-day corporate event stay
We recently spent five days at this hotel as a company group for a corporate event, and the experience left us with genuinely mixed feelings — impressed by what we saw, but let down by how we were treated.
The Positives — and there are real ones:
The rooms are beautiful: spacious, impeccably clean, and thoughtfully designed. The location is excellent and central, and the underground parking garage offered ample spaces — a welcome convenience for our group. In terms of infrastructure, design, and cleanliness, this hotel absolutely has the foundation of a true five-star property.
Where it falls short:
The service, however, does not yet live up to that promise. The staff is friendly, but friendliness alone does not make for five-star hospitality. What was consistently missing was proactivity. Every small request seemed to require supervisor approval, and the overall approach felt reactive rather than anticipatory.
The concierge experience was particularly disappointing. He arranged a taxi that turned out to be drastically overpriced — admittedly, we should have confirmed the fare upfront. But when I raised the issue afterward, his response was a shrug and a comment that it was "an external taxi," as if that absolved him of responsibility. On another occasion, a reception staff member simply told us to book a taxi ourselves.
The breakfast buffet was decent, but in terms of variety and presentation, it felt more in line with a three-star offering than a luxury hotel.
It's also worth mentioning that the pre-arrival booking process, while handled in a friendly and professional manner, left room for improvement — response times were slower than expected, and again, a more proactive approach would have made a meaningful difference.
Overall impression:
This hotel has everything it needs to be outstanding — the aesthetics, the facilities, the location. What it lacks is a service culture to match. The difference between a good hotel and a great one is almost never the marble in the lobby — it's the attitude of the people who greet you in it. With the right investment in service training and a genuine shift from reactive to proactive hospitality, this could easily be one of the best properties in the city.

A quick update to my review after a week, following a follow-up conversation with Ersi, one of the hotel staff. Thanks to Ersi, I’ve upgraded my rating from 4 stars to 5 stars. She really helped to improve the overall service experience. Many thanks and a big thumbs up!

author: PACELL
text: Disorganizzazione inaccettabile: un insulto agli standard di lusso|​Nonostante una conferma telefonica preventiva riguardo all'incontro del Rotary Club, la mia esperienza presso la vostra struttura è stata pessima. Arrivato alle 17:45, sono stato indirizzato dalla reception al primo piano, dove ho trovato il vuoto totale: nessuna traccia dell'evento e nessuna indicazione sul tabellone.|​Ciò che è davvero inammissibile per un hotel di questo prestigio è l'atteggiamento della receptionist: davanti alla mia richiesta di chiarimenti, ha risposto con totale indifferenza, rifiutandosi persino di verificare l'informazione. Un hotel che si fregia di 5 stelle dovrebbe garantire collaboratori proattivi; qui ho trovato solo ignavia. Per quanto mi riguarda, il punteggio è inassegnabile: siamo ampiamente sotto lo zero.

author: Charlie Goodfellow
text:
We recently spent a few days in Tirana and absolutely loved the city, it’s vibrant, welcoming, and we will definitely be back to visit again. Unfortunately, we will not be staying at the Tirana International Hotel when we return.
While the overall holiday was amazing, our experience with our room booking left a very sour taste. We booked and paid extra for a "Deluxe Double Room." However, upon check-in, the room and bathroom we were given looked like a standard tier.
The hotel’s official website and their own promotional signs inside the hotel elevators explicitly state that Deluxe Rooms feature a *"luxurious marbled bathroom with a large bathtub and integrated shower."* Our bathroom had no marble, no bathtub, and only a basic, cramped standalone shower stall.
When we raised this discrepancy on day three, the front desk receptionist completely shut us down, rigidly arguing semantic definitions of "or" rather than looking at the physical evidence of their own hotel advertising. We ended up having to open an investigation through our booking platform. Management ultimately refused to refund even the price difference between the room tiers.
It is incredibly disappointing to pay a premium for specific amenities, be given a lower-tier room, and then be met with zero customer service or accountability when pointing out the blatant false advertising.
Tirana is a wonderful destination, but I would highly recommend booking your stay at a hotel that honors its descriptions and treats its guests with respect.

author: Glen
text:
I have had quite a few stays lately at the Hilton Garden Inn Tirana, and what stands out the most every single time is the reception team. The welcome is always warm, genuine, and highly professional from the moment you walk through the door. Being recognized with eye contact and greeted so naturally really makes a difference and sets the tone for the entire stay.

I would especially like to single out Antonela at reception. She is outstanding in every way — professional, welcoming, attentive, and truly exceptional at what she does. It is clear that she makes guests feel valued and comfortable, and she represents the hotel beautifully. Every encounter with Enisa has also been amazing. Whoever is responsible for training and selecting the employees here is absolutely nailing it.

All of the staff I have encountered, from check-in to check-out, have been helpful, warm, and pleasant. It is clear that this property’s greatest strength is its people.

I would also like to mention the manager, Nertila, who takes the time to personally make the rounds and greet guests. I have seen her do this multiple times during my stays, and it speaks volumes about the culture and hospitality of this hotel.

This is a wonderful property because of wonderful people. Next month I will be traveling to Romania for work, and honestly, I wish it were Tirana so I could stay here again.

Great hotel.

author: Fatima
text:
Un séjour exceptionnel du début à la fin !

Le personnel de cet hôtel est tout simplement extraordinaire : toujours souriant, accueillant, attentionné et prêt à aider à chaque instant. On sent une véritable gentillesse et un grand professionnalisme dans chaque échange. Rarement avons-nous été accueillis avec autant de chaleur et de bienveillance.

Toute l’équipe fait tout pour que les clients se sentent comme chez eux, avec une attention sincère aux détails et un service irréprochable. Grâce à eux, notre séjour a été encore plus agréable et mémorable.

Un immense merci à toute l’équipe: Jurge , Rina, Fidel, Jagnine, Michelle, Oner and Paolo pour leur disponibilité, leur bonne humeur et leur incroyable sens de l’accueil. Nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir et recommandons cet hôtel les yeux fermés !

author: Judith J
text:
Wir verbrachten letztes Wochenende in diesem Hotel. Wir konnten bereits bei Ankunft um 11.30 Uhr einchecken! Die Zimmer sind komfortabel eingerichtet. Ein Highlight ist das Frühstücksbuffet - am liebsten möchte man sich quer durchprobieren. Von Spiegelei auf Toast über frisch gemachte Omeletten (nach Wunsch), über Fleisch- & Käseplatten bis hin zu einen Gemüse-, Früchte- & Müesli-Buffet. Bei der Getränke-Auswahl gibt es am Buffet heisses Wasser für Tee, Filterkaffee, frische Säfte und Sekt. Zusätzlich wird man am Tisch vom Kellner gefragt, ob man zusätzliche Kaffeewünsche hat. Die Cappuccinos & Americanos (Kaffee natur) wurden ohne Verzögerung gebracht.

Auch sonst ist das Personal sehr aufmerksam. Abends in der Bar auf einen Absacker wurden wir sofort bedient. Das Personal an der Rezeption war ebenfalls sehr aufmerksam und hilfsbereit.

Alles in allem ein tolles Erlebnis. Sollte meine Reise wieder nach Tirana führen, werde ich wieder ins Rogner gehen.

author: Adam
text:
This is by far the most important highlight of Albania. I not only strongly recommend it to any visitor.

I also appeal to the Albanian authorities to change the name of the object, because Bunk'Art 1 and 2 is misleading. Both are not at all about Art, rather the opposite of Art. Art needs freedom and this place is about how a horror regime systematically destroyed anything of worth of its own nation, including torturing and executing artists. "Museum of Albanian Communism" should be the proper name for the clandestine Communist Command Center in case of a hot war against any enemy.

author: Nik
text: Wir waren an einem regnerischen Tag dort. Daher war es UNFASSBAR voll. Man musste bei jedem kleinen Raum anstehen. Hinzu kommt, dass alle Wände mit Text vollgeklatscht sind. Das ist so unglaublich viel, dass das wirklich keiner Bock hat zu lesen. Es ist dazu noch super eng und stickig. Den letzten Raum fanden wir sehr interessant - da wurde darüber berichtet, wie Albaner Juden im 2. Weltkrieg vor den nazis beschützt haben. Sehr rührend. Allerdings verstehe ich nicht, wie man direkt im Anschluss an diesen emotionalen Raum einen Random Raum mit optischen Illusionen ranhängt. Etwas geschmacklos und total thematisch unpassend 😂

author: Suzana Ravs (Nana)
text:
National Historical Museum je odličen kraj za spoznavanje bogate zgodovine Albanije. Muzej skozi številne razstave in zgodovinske predmete predstavi razvoj države od antičnih časov do sodobnosti. Posebej izstopa velika mozaik fasada, ki je ena najbolj prepoznavnih podob Tirane.
Razstave so zanimive in raznolike, zato je obisk primeren tako za ljubitelje zgodovine kot za vse, ki želijo bolje razumeti albansko kulturo in preteklost. Lokacija v središču mesta omogoča enostaven obisk med raziskovanjem Tirane. Priporočam obisk vsem, ki jih zanimata zgodovina in kultura Balkana.

author: János Kiss
text: A Tímárok hídja egy kis ékszerdoboz Tirana szívében, ahol a múlt és a jelen látványosan találkozik. Ez a 18. századi, oszmán stílusú kőhíd egykor a várost a keleti hegyvidékekkel összekötő Szent György-karavánút kulcsfontosságú pontja volt, és nevét a környéken megtelepedett bőrművesekről kapta. Különleges élmény, hogy a híd ma is szabadon látogatható, és valóban át lehet rajta sétálni. Ahogy az ember a régi, egyenetlen kövekre lép, egy pillanatra kiszakad a modern város nyüzsgéséből, és szinte érezni lehet a történelem súlyát a talpa alatt. Bár a Lana folyó már nem alatta folyik, a híd restaurálása és környezete segít elképzelni, milyen lehetett itt az élet évszázadokkal ezelőtt.

author: Tomas Z
text: Tanners bridge is a small historic stone bridge you can see from the side of a road. It’s no longer used but restored nicely to retain the history. It was built to go over a river that no longer exists there as it was diverted decades ago. The area is nice and leafy with some local cafes nearby, but I wouldn’t go out of my way to see it.

author: Sonal Akshita
text:

author: Linnie
text:
My partner and I stayed here for 3 nights so we could be close to the vet hospital and walk over to visit our cat in the ICU. The hotel staff were incredibly kind, compassionate, and accommodating throughout our stay. They were very understanding of our situation and even allowed us a complimentary late checkout while we waited to pick up our cat, which meant so much to us.
The room was very clean, and the views of the lake and mountains were absolutely beautiful. Watching the sunset from the room each evening felt magical. The AC worked great and was definitely appreciated, especially during the warmer weather.
The location felt safe, quiet, and clean, in a very up-and-coming residential neighborhood. It’s about a 10-minute walk to a grocery store, bus stop, and coffee shops, and around a 30-minute walk to the lake area. Since it’s more residential, it’s helpful to have a car or take a taxi, and there aren’t many restaurants immediately nearby, so we found ordering from Wolt to be the easiest option.
Overall, the price was very affordable for the quality of the stay, and we would absolutely recommend it—especially for anyone looking for a peaceful, pet-friendly place with kind and supportive staff.

author: Jasta
text: Had an issue with first room, they immediately switched us to anither room, accomodated our pets, super friendly staff, right next to Tirana vet clinic for our animals treatments, great views very quite and fair pricing. If your in need of lodging (especially if your pet has a few days of treatment overnight) then go here for sure

author: Nos Talgic
text: We stayed 2 nights at 3d hotel and enjoyed. Clean rooms, good service, we highly reccomend

author: Anastasiia Stafa
text: Не знаю, за что у этого отеля такой рейтинг, но это ужас. Постельное бельё не выглажено - есть сомнение в его свежести. На полу полно чужих волос. Дверь на балкон сломана - не закрывается (на улице ночью 5°, если не ниже). Кондиционер шумит, как атомная станция.

author: christelle coustier
text: Petit hôtel familial très bien situé, pour les visites. Nous avons être très bien accueilli. La chambre était confortable. Très belle vue de la terrasse et petit déjeuner délicieux !! emplacement de parking, très pratique.

author: Mathieu H.
text:
Mira was a wonderful host, and helpful for discovering Berat and canyon.
Breakfasts on the terrace are great.
Perfectly located to discover Berat and its castle.

author: 17reynaldr
text: A short experience with one night in Berat but it was great, very kind person and the villa was very clean. The private parking is one more thing.|The breakfast with a incredible view !

author: Hedvig Mathiasson
text: Så mysigt hotell med jättegod frukost

author: Venona16
text:
Do Villi trzeba dojść jakieś 40 minut pieszo z postoju busików. Jednakże usytuowana jest w cudownym paśmie domków i restauracji.
Sklepy z pamiątkami i piękne widoki z tarasu sprawiają, że czujesz w tym miejscu szczęście. 😀 Sympatyczna gospodyni wytłumaczyła nam jak najłatwiej dojść do zamku znajdującego się na wzgórzu.
Po drodze spotkaliśmy starszego Pana czekającego na towarzysza do partyjki w szachy. Wszystko ma to taki ponadczasowy klimat jakby czas w tym miejscu nie grał żadnej roli.
Bardzo urocze, i wyjątkowe miejsce do spędzania urlopu. Polecam!

author: Katarzyna M
text: Beautiful view, very good breakfast, very nice and clean room, the owner is very friendly and accomodating. I highly recommend

author: sarah foster
text:
Lovely authentic hotel. Modern bathroom large room on top floor with its own gorgeous balcony.stunnibg views
Friendly owners
Simple fresh breakfast
Great bar onsite

author: Heiko Lorenz
text: Oktober 2025: Toll gelegene, privat geführte Unterkunft mit landestypischen, ausreichendem Frühstück. Die Unterkunft ist modern und sauber, die Herbergseltern freundlich und zuvorkommend. Man kann direkt vor der Tür parken. Von der Unterkunft aus kann man schön die Burg erkunden und findet genügend Restaurants fußläufig. In die Stadt führt eine abschüssige glattgelaufene Pflasterstraße, den Rückweg sollte man bequem mit dem Taxi absolvieren.

author: Ronen Faradian
text: מקום מעולה, יפה, אותנטי. החדרים יפים, המיקום הוא בתוך המתחם של הטירה.חניה בצמוד.

author: Ofer Ben Shalom
text:
Incredible guesthouse.
Located in the walls of the Berat castle, watching an amazing view of the valley & city bellow.

The hosts are incredible, always helping with anything we have needed.

Rooms are simple yet provided exactly what we needed. There are many restaurants nearby, and adjacent parking.

Greatly recommended.

author: Uli Steingruber
text:
Schönstes Guesthouse während unserer Albanientour.
Aldi, der Besitzer ist sehr nett und hilft bei allen Fragen.
Dachzimmer ausgesprochen schön mit guter Aussicht.

author: segev eshel
text:
We had the best time!
The host was super nice and kind!
The rooms were great, and it have the most beautiful view from the castle to Berat.

author: Koreaner & Deutsche
text:
청결하고 주인분 친절하고 좋습니다.
조식은 기대를 해서 그런지 살짝 실망했는데 다시 생각해보니 공짜조식으로는 100% 만족합니다.
뚜벅이들한테는 조금 멀고 차있으면 노상관.
오히려 주차하기 편하고 한적해서 더 좋습니다.

추천쓰

author: Hasan Agovic
text: Çok güzel , nezih ve sıcak bir ortam, sahipleri çok ilgili . Kahve sunumu çok tatlı. Kesinlikle tavsiye ediyorum....

author: Lik Tsche
text: Sehr nettes Guesthouse. Garten, in dem das Frühstück serviert wird. Schöne Atmosphäre.

author: Fereshte Hakimi
text: Freundliche Gastgrberin, köstlicher Frühstuck

author: Hadi gülümse Gül GNRYC
text: Harika bir ortam, bahce cok güzel harika çiçek ve portakal limon cicekleri kokusu ile. Odalar tertemiz ve hersey mevcut. Ev sahipleri bizim gibi cok sicak kanlı ve misafirperver. Kesinlikle tavsiye ederim

author: Kardelen Çölkuşu
text:
Perfect stay!
The house is clean, cozy, and the location is delightful.
Icing on the cake Luli, the owner, is a fantastic and incredibly kind person.
If you’re looking for a place to stay in Berat, this is your home :)

author: Nis
text:
Supertolle Unterkunft für einen Besuch in Berat.
Großer Parkplatz vor dem Haus [selten in Berat].
Achtung: Google Maps leitet euch einen völligen Mist zusammen. Wir haben es nur hoch geschafft weil Allrad, welches wir zuschalten mussten. Fahrt unbedingt die Straße am Restaurant RUS!!! vorbei dann müsst ihr nicht 1000 Tode sterben.
Es führen um die 180 Treppenstufen hinunter in die Stadt, der Weg ist größtenteils Unbeleuchtet.
Die Duschen sind für albanische Verhältnisse ganz normal im Bad so integriert dass man weder Duschwanne noch Vorhang etc hat, schön wäre jedoch einen Abzueher zu haben, sodass man ein wenig trocken machen kann.
Das Frühstück ist okay, nichts besonderes. Kaffee ist Mangelware haben unsere Espressokocher dabei gehabt, Lucky us.
Der Besitzer macht jedoch Espresso, auf Wunsch auch Americano.
Alles in allem war es fantastisch hier zu sein, die Gastgeber, Vater und Sohn sind super nett, Sprachen englisch und Italienisch.

author: Katarzyna Roszak
text: Un séjour absolument parfait, avec une vue époustouflante et le petit déjeuner délicieux !!!

author: Eugen Arndt
text: Sehr freundlicher Besitzer. Schlichte, aber saubere Zimmer. Jedoch fehlt der Duschvorhang und dadurch wird das ganze Badezimmer nass. Das Haus zu finden ist gar nicht so einfach. Aber die Aussicht ist exzellent. Über einen schmalen Pfad gelangt man runter ins Stadtzentrum. Man sollte aber gut zu Fuß sein 😉

author: Susanne
text: Wundervoller Ausblick auf Berat und die Olivenhaine! Die Gastgeber sind wahnsinnig herzlich und total bemüht! Große Empfehlung :)

author: Estelle LEROY
text:
Nous avons séjourné 2 nuits.
La vue est magnifique et la terrasse agréable.
Les hôtes sont très gentils.
Accès en centre ville à pied en moins de dix minutes.
Accès en voiture possible

author: Milena P
text: Hotel na żywo wygląda o wiele lepiej niż na zdjęciach. Pokoje są skromne ale czyste, jest wszystko czego potrzeba. Piękny widok na panoramę miasta. Do centrum można zejść schodami od ogrodu właściciela,zajmuje to 5 min- nic strasznego :)  dojazd trochę trudny ale Gospodarz wysłał mapę i daliśmy radę nawet starym fordem fiesta. Bardzo podobał mi się ogród- tak sielsko, wiejsko - są drzewa z oliwkami, winogron, granaty czy figi, które można jeść prosto z drzewka :) niska cena, a jest fajnie ! Warto odwiedzić nawet dla samego widoku. Dziękuję ☺️

author: A Rsl
text: The guest house was very cozy and beautiful, very much a "summer in italy" vibe, with grapevines and a lovely view. There was also a cute cat who came to say hi. The complimentary breakfast was tasty and the rooms were clean. The wifi was a bit weak in our room but it was fine.

author: Antonia Reid
text: The owner was incredibly kind and welcoming, and he’ll make sure you have the right directions to reach the hotel by car. Breakfast was absolutely delicious and served in his beautiful garden. The walk to and from town is quite steep, but it’s a lovely stroll.

author: Marine “MarinshR”
text: 2nd time at Tomor’s house. Always a pleasure !! The best breakfast we had. The best host. A kind and lovable soul. We consider him as a friend now! His wife cooks amazingly. Recommend 100%

author: Peter Oppeker
text: Wir waren im Sommer bei Tomor zu Gast. Er hat sich rührend um uns gekümmert und uns viele Informationen gegeben. Das Zimmer war sehr gut, das Frühstück hervorragend, ein empfehlenswerter Gastgeber!

author: Μανθος Λαμπρακης
text:
Απο την ομορφη Κρητη... στο πολυ ομορφο Μπερατι... Ενα απιστευτο ταξειδι με παραμονη προτοχρονιας στον ξενωνα Guest  house. Ο οικοδεσποτης Tomor Shehu ηταν παρα πολυ φιλικος και χαμογελαστος με τα δωματια του να ειναι κεντρικα εχοντας ολα τα καφε και φαγαδικα στα ποδια σου.
Το δωματιο ηταν αρκετα καλο για αυτο που ψαχναμε.
Συγουρα την επομενη φορα που θα παμε θα ειναι σε εσενα αγαπητε Tomor!!!
Σε ευχατιστουμε για ολλα.

author: Daniel Ninio
text:
Tomor and his wife were the best hosts I’ve ever had in any guesthouse I’ve ever been to.  Period. We’ve experienced great hospitality and great breakfast. He welcomed us with a great smile and lots of love, helped us every day to get a close parking spot, literally standing in an empty spots nearby!

There’s a mosque really close, but we heard it only once a day on the afternoon, and it didn’t make any sound in the morning. Don’t worry about it!

Moreover, Tomor sent us a lot of explanations about the city’s history and leisure activities. Highly recommended!! Thank you Tomor! ❤️

author: Maria Elisa Zafra Griñán
text: Un alojamiento excelente! La ubicación inmejorable, en una calle tranquila, a 1' del paseo, especial para dar una vuelta de noche. Tomor, el dueño fue muy amable, nos explicó un poquito la historia de la ciudad y hasta nos enseñó fotos de la crecida del río. Si vuelvo repetiré.

author: Wolfgang Frieß
text: Tomor ist ein exzellenter Gastgeber. Wir wurden mit Trauben und einer Tasse Mocca und vielen guten Ratschlägen für den Aufenthalt in Berat empfangen. Die Lage in der Altstadt ist bestens, das Zimmer sauber und wohnlich. Eine uneingeschränkte Empfehlung ist auch das Frühstück, unbedingt buchen! Für das Abendessen bietet sich das kleine aber sehr gute Restaurant Mali in der Nähe an.

author: Roberto Colombo
text:
Il posto è in centro all'inizio del quartiere storico Mangalem e a due passi dalla zona pedonale quindi in ottima posizione per visitare la città e scaricare i bagagli.
Tomor (il proprietario) è un esempio di gentilezza e accoglienza albanese sempre disponibile per consigli sulle città. la camera è semplice ma tipica di un'abitazione tipica ottomana con patio esterno per la colazione che consigliamo.

author: nonange
text: Ottima sistemazione a Barat! La casa é comoda, facile da raggiungere, il signor Tomor, gentilissimo parla italiano e inglese. L'ospitalità é offerta  in stanze con entrate autonome. La super colazione preparata dalla moglie, viene servita sotto un pergolato!

author: ramona
text:
Posto meraviglioso....pieno di storia e cultura....Camminare tra le mura del Castello di Berat (Kala) è come fare un viaggio indietro nel tempo. La cosa più affascinante è che si tratta di una "fortezza viva": ancora oggi, all’interno delle sue antiche mura, ci sono case abitate, stradine acciottolate e un’atmosfera magica che domina tutta la valle.

La vista che si gode da quassù è semplicemente mozzafiato e ogni pietra racconta secoli di storia, tra chiese bizantine e architettura ottomana. Un luogo unico al mondo, dichiarato Patrimonio dell'Umanità UNESCO, che va assolutamente visitato se siete in Albania! 🇦🇱📸

author: Kanishk
text: Good spot for a quick stop, the high elevation leaves you with fantastic views for the city.

author: Laith MF
text: An ancient historical site with many restaurants and shops selling traditional Albanian items and souvenirs tucked away in its alleyways... absolutely wonderful to spend a pleasant time and enjoy seeing the city at night, and the sunset was also breathtaking.

author: Steffi E.
text: Sehr eindrucksvoll Areal. Der Wehg war etwas schwierig zu finden.

author: Paula Clarke
text: It reminded me of harry potter and it's absolutely unique and georgous little town.

author: Laci Vida
text: Szezonban kocsival felmenni, és parkolót találni szinte lehetetlen. A várban laknak, így séta közben van autó forgalom. Kilátás szép.

author: Nicole Schubert
text: Wunderschöne Gegend mit vielen tollen Eindrücken

author: Leire
text: Ruta guiada muy completa, con un guía estupendo, Soni. Durante el trayecto nos fue explicando curiosidades sobre Albania y Berat. Tras realizar rutas de ensueño por el cañon de Osumi, disfrutamos de un chapuzón y comimos frente al río. Encantadas con la experiencia!

author: Manon de Jong
text: Geweldige tour gehad met een goede gids. De hike was soms best ‘challenging’ maar je werd er goed doorheen geholpen en daarna een prachtig uitzicht!! Onderweg naar de plekken verteld de gids veel over de omgeving en de geschiedenis ervan en na afloop een heerlijke lunch. Aanrader!

author: Karman
text: We hebben met een klein busje een tour door Osumi canyon gedaan. Wij liepen de avond van te voren het kantoor in en konden de volgende dag nog mee. De weg is kronkelig, maar wel verhard, toch mag je er met de huurauto van veel maatschappijen niet komen, omdat het laatste deel van de weg naar permet niet verhard is. Goede chauffeur en fijne gids die onderweg veel vertelt. Lunch is inclusief en er is word rekening gehouden met dieetwensen. Er zijn voldoende stops voor toilet bezoek en bij uitzicht punten en je maakt twee keer een korte wandeling (waterval en kloof). Er is ook twee keer gelegenheid om te zwemmen, maar het water is rond de 10 graden (in mei). Zeker deze tour boeken als je in Berat bent!

author: Mar Fernández Vieites
text: Muy buena la excursión al Cañón del Osumi y la catarata de Bovoge. Soni es un gran guía y nos contó muchísimo sobre la historia de Albania y su gente ❤️

author: Valentina
text: Es war ein super schöner Start in den Urlaub. Wir haben eine Osum Canyon & Bogove Waterfall Tour gebucht. Soni ist ein super Guide, 💯 Punkte. Während der Fahrt hat Soni uns über Albanien, Berat und Traditionen informiert. Hat uns einige Aussichtspunkte in Canyon gezeigt und Legenden erzählt :) Wir würden jederzeit die Tour wieder buchen. Vielen Dank an Soni. Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Tag.

author: Thomas Gesick
text: Igi was an absolutely fantastic tour guide for the Osumi Canyon and Bogove Waterfall tour. He was super friendly and knowledgeable and it made our trip to Berat unforgettable!

author: Massimo Briani
text: Amazing tour of Berat with Saimir. He is really professional tour leader with an incredible knowledge of the Berat history and traditions. He speaks perfectly Italian and for us it was an important plus. Super recommended!

author: Michael Newman
text: The Perfect Tour Guide. We had a wonderful tour around the city of Berat with Samil. He was knowledgeable, humourous and endlessly patient covering the history of this fascinating city at the crossroads of so many cultures. Thank you.

author: Coralie -
text: J'ai adoré l'excursion au Canyon D'Ossum. J'y suis allée fin Octobre donc l'eau était plus froide donc on a privilégié la randonnée au-dessus du Canyon avec une superbe vue et on est tout de même descendu dans le canyon à un endroit où on pouvait se baigner si on le souhaitait. C'était agréable d'être avec le guide Soni qui a bien conduit tout en nous parlant de l'histoire de son pays.

author: Jan Daemen
text: Berat is een leuke plaats met een kasteel. Wel een beetje toeristisch.

author: Steffi E.
text: Tolles Städtchen. Wir waren mit dem Linienbus da.

author: Shubz
text: Beautiful village 😍 Stone houses and good food..

author: gina bid
text: Labai specifinis,įdomus ir gražus miestas.Nepravažiuokite pro šalį!

author: Volkanovic
text: Schöne Aussichtsplattform mit tollem Blick man kann schon bis nach Berat rüberschauen. Perfekt, um schöne Fotos zu machen. Insgesamt ein sehr schöner Ort für einen kurzen Stopp und zum Genießen der Aussicht.

author: Marek Wlodarczyk
text: Najpiękniejszy widok, warto było tutaj przyjechać.

author: Berat Kağan Anar
text: Beni izlemeniz çok ayıp 😃

author: Laurent
text: Une magnifique vue sur la vallée, qui est encore plus belle si avez montée à pied jusqu'au belvédère.

author: Ian Walpole
text: Had a lovey coffee in the daytime.

author: Giritlim Butik Otel
text: Berat 'da köprünün karşısında en güzel manzaraya karşı harika kokteyller var.İşletme ,sunum mükemmel.Müzik de müthiş.Teşekkürler.❤️🙏

author: הודיה רונן
text: אחלה של מקום קוקטלים ברמה גבוהה ממש

author: Demal Mégane
text: Je recommande, serveur et service au top !! Les cocktail sont délicieux ! 😋

author: Logan Leclercq
text: Serveur très sympathique , cocktail de qualité , accueil très chaleureux, je recommande fortement 🫶🏽

author: Ian Coulton
text: Fantastic small cocktail bar, super friendly staff, great cocktails at budget frendly prices and awesome music. Would 100% recommend 👌

author: Fabjan Gremshi
text:
This was one of the most nicest bars in berat it was the only one who stayed open after 00:00
Delicious cocktails and a very friendly staff
And very affordable prices
Nice music
And a great atmosphere

author: Johannes Klein
text: Die Betreiber sind sehr gute Gastgeber. An den Chared-Tables kommt man mit den anderen Gäste schnell ins Gespräch und hat einen unvergesslichen Abend!

author: BinBesserAlsDu
text: Best dining experience ever! 😊

author: Nick Z.
text: This is one of the most interesting places I've ever been. Lili as such is a great and funny person who speaks a lot of languages.  His friendlyness and outstanding service is unforgettable. The location is special and the food excellent. It is an absolute "must go" location. Thanks Lili for a great experience combined with exellent food.

author: J R
text: I didn't get to eat there, because it was full (Saturday night), but the host was SO nice to me I need to rate it.

author: Patricia und Manfred
text: Der Besuch dieses Restaurants ist mehr als nur Essen gehen. Lili ist superfreundlich, macht alles noch persönlicher indem er die Gäste immer mit Namen anspricht. Er ist ein wahrer Entertainer. Wir hatten Glück am Shared-Table zu sitzen mit lieben Menschen aus verschiedenen Ländern. So sind neue Kontakte entstanden. Dazu noch das echt sehr schmackhafte Essen, der selbstgemachte Rotwein und Raki, einfach ein tolles Erlebnis und ein unvergesslicher Abend. Danke an Lili und seine Familie ❤️

author: Jeremy Naylor
text: Thank you so much for an amazing evening 🙏

author: J.H.
text: Many thanks to Lili and his family for this unique experience! We had a great diner with people from all over the world. The food was excellent. All the best from Monique and Joel from Germany!

author: Hakan Reis
text: Gerçekten sahibi olan beyefendi çok orijinal bir karakter ve mükemmel bir deneyim sunuyor insana. Biz tek masaydık ve bu sebepten servis harikaydı. Adeta adamın evine akşam misafir olmuşuz gibi bizi ağırladı, yemekler harici kendi yaptığı rakı, şarap ve tüm ürünlerden tattırdı. Kendisi ingilizce yanında anlaşacak kadar da Türkçe biliyor. Rezervasyon şansı pek yok off sezonlarda gitmek biraz daha şansınızı arttırıyor, yemekler ise gerçekten lezzetli. Her bir yemeğin kendi ayrı rahiyası ve aroması var ve tarihi ile alakalı da bilgi veriyor paylaşımları çok güzel. Ben kesinlikle öneririm Berat deneyimimizi eşsiz bir hala getirdi Lili Bey. Sadece bir yemekte domuz ürünü var kendisi bunu belirtip menüden onu çıkartıyor. Tadım menüsü tarzı bir fix menüsü var ve hepsi bölgenin yöresel yemekleri.

author: Janina Kaissermueller
text: Was soll ich sagen, es war eine tolle Erfahrung. Das Essen von Lilis Frau ist Mega. Man kommt mit anderen Leuten zusammen. Es ist einfach eine tollte Atmosphäre etwas ganz was anderes als klassisch in ein Restaurant zu gehen.

author: Bilbo
text: Trato fantástico, sitio estupendo, ojalá tengan mucha suerte con el proyecto

author: Annalisa Ghirotti
text: Io e mia sorella siamo state a cena e abbiamo mangiato benissimo. Locale molto bello, arredato con gusto. Ambiente tranquillo e rilassante. Musica di sottofondo perfetta. Personale estremamente gentile e professionale.

author: Elyn Kim
text: I asked for a Korean-style iced Americano, and they made it perfectly! The atmosphere was elegant, and the decorations were beautiful. I definitely recommend this place to anyone staying in Berat!!

author: Julita Danilczuk
text: We had an amazing evening! 🍷 The staff passionately explained the wines and shared lots of interesting stories and details. The appetizers were delicious and the atmosphere was fantastic !  Definitely a place worth visiting!

author: Elidon Shehu
text: Sehr schön laden top ❤️❤️

author: Jessica Gilbert
text: Great food and great service :)

author: Jumper&Anna
text: Une très jolie décoration en plus d’une ambiance sympa. Serveur très agréable et des plats excellents. Je conseilles vivement !

author: J R
text: The staff was very nice, but I'm afraid I was disappointed by the food.

author: Mykola Dykun
text: Pyszne śniadanie z pięknym widokiem , pan kelner bardzo miły ‚ uprzejmy i pomocny 😋

author: Renilde Vrijsen
text:
Heel vriendelijk, lekker eten, top !!!
Meatballs waren voortreffelijk!!!

author: Maelis Dubois
text: Incroyable repas fait maison et prix bas, une vue magnifique et un super service 😍

author: Savanna Taylor
text:
The only reason to stay here is for the food, views, and service. Rooms are uncomfortable, pillows are thick memory foam. Worst part, our room had a second door to the hallway with glass windows that were covered with a curtain ON THE OUTSIDE,  so anyone in the hallway (or walking off the street, as the dogs to the outside and the gate were never locked) could look directly into your bed, without even trying. We covered with a towel but didn't feel safe
Breakfast is good but a waste of food if you don't eat the 4 donuts and 300g of yogurt per person.  I won't recommend this place.

author: Will F.
text: Absolutely perfect, a real gem. Super good service and food.

author: Lama Bipin
text:
Excellent restaurant ! Très bon accueil, service rapide et plats délicieux.
Je recommande sans hésiter 👍

author: Clement Chotin
text: Le restaurant est incroyable et le serveur est super gentil et très agréable. Je recommande fortement

author: Fation Malka
text: Best view,best food.Stephan 10/10 service for us👍🫡

author: Bratschnik
text: Es hat eine Säule gedauert bis wir bestellen konnten. Das Essen war aber lecker, das warten hat sich gelohnt.

author: Jean-Michel Prost
text: Restaurant avec terrasse et belle vue sur le quartier orthodoxe de Berat. Service efficace voire rapide pour assurer la rotation! Nourriture correcte et bon rapport qualité prix.

author: Michael J.
text: Wir waren mit einer Reisegruppe da. Die Speisen waren gut bis befriedigend. Das Lamm war nicht zu empfehlen. Sehr fett, wenig Fleisch. Service war gut, es hat aber auch unser Busfahrer geholfen. Ambiente ist echt schön.

author: Kate Bishop
text:
Just perfect for lunch -delicious stuffed vine leaves & incredible aubergine.
House white wine was lovely too.

Highly recommended for a relaxing meal away from the busy streets.

Friendly staff and great value for all we had.

author: Miquel Àngel Ferrà Alemany
text:
Recomendación de nuestra guia en el lugar, sin duda muy acertada.

Restaurante con una terraza panorámica que nos otorga unas espectaculares vistas del pueblo y del rio.

La carta es bastante tradicional, aunque también ofrece bastantes opciones más “para todos los gustos” como filetes empanados o espaguetis.
Nosotros nos decantamos por los platos típicos de la zona con influencia griega y fue todo un acierto, sobretodo recomiendo la mousaka (aunque ciertamente le faltaba algo de jugosidad) y los pimientos rellenos de arroz.

author: Deb
text:
Tasty food
Large portions

author: Rodolfo Asar
text:
Run away from there. It's a typical tourist trap right across from the bridge exit.
The food is terrible, with misleading signs at the door, and once you go in they serve you leftovers and, to top it all off, they overcharge you.
Some people think tourists are stupid and can be taken advantage of to make easy money.
And that's how they're killing tourism in Berat, a beautiful city that doesn't deserve it.

Huyan de ahí. Es la típica trampa para turistas justo frente a la salida del puente.
Comida muy mala, con carteles engañosos en la puerta, y una vez que entras te dan de comer sobras y, por si fuera poco, te cobran de más.
Hay gente que cree que los viajeros somos estúpidos a los que exprimir para hacer dinero fácil.
Y así van matando el turismo en Berat, una ciudad preciosa que no se lo merece.

author: Karima Ibourahima
text: Très bon restaurant situé le long du lac! Les plats sont copieux et délicieux.  Un grand merci à Lionel qui nous a très bien accueilli et servi! :)

author: Hasibe
text:
We had an amazing experience at Wildor Restaurant in Berat! Everything was absolutely delicious.

We were a group of 3 and created our own shared menu, which turned out to be perfect: the Wildor salad, stuffed pepper, stuffed eggplant, yaprak, baked cheese, and chicken fillet escalope (reccomended!!!!). Every single dish was full of flavour and beautifully prepared.

The staff was very kind, polite and welcoming, which made the experience even better. Everything from the food to the service exceeded our expectations.

We will definitely recommend this restaurant to our friends who plan to visit Berat. A must-visit when you’re in the city!

author: Savi Chen
text: 海鮮燉飯很不錯 米芯的口感很合我的胃口。服務員弟弟工作和服務態度都很好👍

author: Kapkapchmurko
text:
Grandma's meatballs were okay but I would call it medium size - we received meatballs with little tomato sauce and bread. Baklava on the other hand was tasty but I wish there were more fruits added :)
You can only pay by cash (LEK and EUR)

author: The D.A.Y.
text:
Restaurant proposant de la viande halal, Idéalement situé en bordure de la route principale, juste à côté de la mosquée du Bachelor et du nouveau pont.
L'accueil fut bon présageant bonne suite mais ce ne fut pas totalement le cas hélas.
La salade du pays était bonne, les boulettes et le plat de viande à la sauce tomate et fromage cottage auraient pu être très bon avec moins de sel, c'est dommage.
Ensuite le service fut long pour avoir le dessert, un kadaif qui n'est pas cuit à la minute. Une fois servi j'ai compris pourquoi le serveur avait disparu pour apparaître une vingtaine de minutes après. Le kadaif était glacé, dur comme sortant du congélateur. J'ai fait la remarque au serveur qui s'est timidement excusé.
Bref, ce n'est pas mauvais mais mon expérience n'a pas été à la hauteur de ce que j'espérais

author: Eric van Wessel
text: Traditioneel en lekker halal eten. Buiten zit je op twee meter afstand van ronkende auto's voor het stoplicht, maar dat hoort bij het vakantiegevoel in een vreemd land.

author: Zakir Hussain
text: Great food, good service.

author: Nerea Chica
text: We arrived with no reservation, at noon, 8 people. We left full, happy and definitely would go back again. The lamb chops were fantastic and all the traditional dishes were the best we had tasted in the whole trip.

text: Schönes Hotel in toller Lage mitten in Saranda! Ramiz als Gastgeber war wirklich aufmerksam und hat sich um alles gekümmert, man hat sich sofort wohl gefühlt. Die Zimmer könnten kleine Verbesserungen gebrauchen aber insgesamt war es ein angenehmer Aufenthalt. Gute Wahl für den Preis

author: Brunilda Fezulla
text: e un resort che ha tutto la pozione il servizio il 🌇 tramonto tutto la panorama le pulizie in camera ogni giorno. ha tutto e il migliore hotel e resort in Albania .

author: prachi kasar
text: Nice service , breakfast was good and many options to chose . Rooms were neat and clean . The view from balcony and beach is just awesome .

author: Laura Urbani
text: Ci siamo trovati davvero bene! Pulizia ottima, colazione buffet fantastica con cucina a vista dove ogni mattina vengono preparate al momento crepes, pancakes, frittelle etc, oltre alla già ampia scelta di pietanze dolci e salate. Ma la cosa che, più di tutto, ci ha lasciato un bel ricordo dell’Hotel Apollon è stata la gentilezza, la disponibilità, l’educazione e i sorrisi di tutto lo staff. Ci siamo sentiti accolti fin da subito! Grazie!

author: Aliza Levy
text:
המלון מרוחק מהטיילת שהיא מקום נהדר לבילוי בערב , אבל זה לא נורא כי נמצאת במרחק של כעשרים דקות הליכה.
החדר בקומה 2 נחמד , אבל חוסר תשומת לב לפרטים הקטנים - במקלחת אין דלת וכל המים מציפים את חדר האמבטיה וזה חבל.
ארוחת הבוקר במרפסת של המלון נפלאה , אוויר נפלא ונוף של החוף והאוכל ממש טעים , כולל הבורק המפורסם של אלבניה .
העובדים מאוד חביבים ונותנים שירות מכל הלב

author: Leticia Letty
text: Excelente Un service impeccable, des plats délicieux, une vue magnifique et un accueil très chaleureux 🥰😍♥️

author: Marjorie Torres
text: El mejor hotel me encanto! Volveré este hotel, el personal muy atento y amable mi estadía fue la mejor los recomiendo a 100%

author: Jacek G
text: Nie wiem jak w sezonie ale w maju cena zdecydowanie atrakcyjna. Śniadanie w porządku, plaza i parking również ogarnięte bardzo dobrze. Ja miałem pokój na 4 piętrze z widokiem na morze. Zdecydowanie zapisuje jako opcje „na kiedyś” bo sprawdzona miejscówka. Saranda trochę rozciągnięta ale jakoś nie było dużego problemu z wyjazdem i powrotami samochodem. Hotel centralnie przy morzu. Jak jest wolne miejsce można zaparkować pod dachem, reszta parkingu odkryta. Pokój czysty, co dzień obsługa ogarnia do południa.

author: mladen lalatovic
text:
Great location.
Super friendly and helpful staff.

author: Imad Zarif
text: Accueil très agréable que ce soit à la réception ou au service bar ou service de ménage.  C'est  dommage que les chambres soient un peu petites mais la présence des balcons compensent. Très bon petit déjeuner... mais manque un micro onde pour chauffer...Le lait pat exp. Bref. Super séjour que je recommencerai.  Merci.

author: Cherisse Vandenhoek
text:
Check-in at Saranda Palace was smooth and we were able to drop our bags early. However, there’s no secure luggage room, so keep that in mind.
The hotel has quite strict rules regarding towels and outside food/drinks. They only gave us one keycard for two people, which was annoying because the air conditioning only works with the card in the slot.
The room itself was fine but smaller than expected, with plenty of storage. Unfortunately there were some issues: no hooks for towels in the bathroom, a broken shower head, and a very loud fan. Housekeeping was thorough but used a lot of bleach — the strong chemical smell was noticeable throughout the day.
Beach access wasn’t set up yet, so only pool loungers were available. Poolside cocktails are pre-made mixers.
Breakfast was extremely disappointing — basically inedible. Orange-flavoured croissants, cold French toast, and very average eggs.
The front desk receptionist was quite rude, not welcoming, and didn’t take feedback well at all.
Overall, the hotel has potential with its location but felt poorly managed with several basic issues. Would not recommend in its current state.

author: D'Jack Official
text: I recomend this place a lot...very quiet and also beautiful place..a big like to reception girl ...to the cafe waiter and also the restaurant waiter who was very profesional

author: D'JACK
text: The best hotel in saranda...Also i recomend the restaurant of this hotel ...delicious food and professional service ! I'll be back for sure!

author: Dritan Hidri
text:
Hotel situato in una posizione fantastica, nel cuore di Saranda, con una vista meravigliosa su Corfù che rende tutto ancora più speciale. La camera era pulita, curata e molto confortevole. Il vero punto di forza però è stato il ristorante: cena semplicemente eccezionale, pesce freschissimo cucinato alla perfezione e sapori davvero incredibili. Ogni piatto era preparato con grande attenzione e si sentiva la qualità degli ingredienti.
Anche il servizio è stato impeccabile: staff gentile, professionale e sempre disponibile, ci hanno fatto sentire accolti dall’inizio alla fine. Abbiamo trascorso una serata bellissima e indimenticabile in famiglia. Consiglio vivamente questo hotel sia per soggiornare che per cenare. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

author: Kos Mustafa
text:
Esperienza semplicemente indimenticabile al Hotel Saranda Palace! La camera era stupenda: elegante, super accogliente, impeccabilmente pulita e con ogni comfort necessario per sentirsi davvero coccolati.

Ma il vero spettacolo è stato il ristorante: qualcosa di straordinario. Ho vissuto una delle cene più buone della mia vita! Piatti eccezionali, curati alla perfezione e realizzati con ingredienti freschissimi e di altissima qualità. Il crudo era spettacolare, freschissimo e preparato in modo impeccabile: un’esplosione di sapori che mi ha conquistato dal primo assaggio.

Servizio eccellente, atmosfera meravigliosa e un’esperienza che consiglio a chiunque voglia concedersi un soggiorno speciale. Non vedo l’ora di tornare!

author: elona mano
text:
The stay at Hotel Saranda Palace was a very positive experience. The facilities are well maintained and organized, while the cuisine stands out for its excellent quality and flavor — truly one of the hotel’s strongest highlights 🍽️.
In particular, Xheku’s service was impressive: attentive, professional, and consistently courteous, creating a welcoming atmosphere that made the experience even more enjoyable.
A place I would definitely recommend to anyone looking for high service standards in Saranda 🌊.

author: Maria Magdalena Pizzeria
text: Super restorant super resort super ushqim kamarieri Xheku👌👌👌e keshillojme pa fund

text: Food was okay. The event bar charger different people different amounts for the same thing.

text: Leider zur Zeit dauerhafte Lärm am Baustelle nebenan

author: Suela
text:
Le volte che siamo venuti a Saranda questo è sempre stato il nostro albergo preferito. La posizione è splendida e la vista davvero bellissima.
Il parcheggio è comodo, la colazione è fresca e preparata al momento, mentre le camere sono estremamente confortevoli e impeccabili dal punto di vista della pulizia.
Un ringraziamento speciale anche al personale, sempre gentile, professionale e disponibile.
