author: Kathy Tran
text: The staff and service were amazing. The girls at the reception desk were super nice and helpful. 5 stars for service but the reason for only 3 stars is the hotel room was just so-so and the biggest disappointment was the beach being closed due to renovations. We visited in late April-early May which I know is off-season but I booked Demi Hotel specifically because it is beachfront and was expecting to be able to relax at the beach (even if it was too cold to go in the water). They had the Demi Lounge open for use but there was only one area of seating that had an umbrella.

author: ElaC67
text: Excellent location,exellent food,very clean room,very friendly staff

author: Enes Beqari
text:
Stafi është shumë i sjellshëm dhe mikpritës, gjë që e bën eksperiencën më të këndshme. Parkimi është i mirë dhe i lehtë për t’u aksesuar. Mëngjesi është shumë i mirë, do ta vlerësoja 10/10.
Megjithatë, ka disa mangësi që duhen përmirësuar. Dhoma është relativisht e vogël për çmimin që paguhet. Gjithashtu, duket që disa gjëra janë lënë pas dore: kur përdoret uji në katet e sipërme dëgjohet zhurmë në tubacione, ndërsa në dhomat 303 dhe 304 kaseta e banjos ka rrjedhje.
Pastrimi është në nivel të mirë (9/10), por do të ishte mirë të kushtohej më shumë vëmendje detajeve si pluhuri. Një tjetër problem janë peshqirët – edhe pse të larë, kanë njolla që nuk janë hequr dhe nuk janë aq të butë sa pritet për një hotel të këtij niveli. Gjithashtu, vendi ku vendosen peshqirët ka dëmtime nga lagështira.
Sugjerime për përmirësim:
Varesja metalike e rrobave në ballkon është e ndryshkur dhe do të ishte mirë të zëvendësohej me një plastike.
Tek ekspresi i kafesë duhet të vendoset ujë për çdo klient të ri; makina ishte bosh dhe me mbetje pluhuri.
Parkimi do të përmirësohej me vijëzime më të qarta dhe vendosjen e një pasqyre sigurie, duke qenë se është malore dhe ka dalje të kufizuar në shikueshmëri.
Gjatë muajit mars po kryhen punime në bar për përgatitjen e sezonit, çka ndikon që ambienti të mos shijohet maksimalisht.
Në përgjithësi, për raportin cilësi-çmim (mars 2026, jashtë sezoni), do ta vlerësoja me hater 8/10.

author: Idi Va
text: Hotel i shklqyer, pastertia dhe korrektesia per tu marre shembull. Kamarierja Ema gjithmone e qeshur dhe e shpejte. Ushqimi shume cilesor dhe me shije. Meriton 5 yje

author: Kari Oransky
text: We had a wonderful stay! The room was nice, breakfast was delicious with many options, and everyone at the front desk was very accommodating to our questions and needs.

author: sandrine thuault
text:
Très bel hôtel avec parking souterrain, situé au bout du port, ville 10 minutes à pieds, donc au calme.
Magnifique chambre avec balcon et vue sur la mer, belle décoration avec plateau d’accueil (cafetière et bouilloire) bouteilles d’eau. Le personnel est charmant et le petit déjeuner est copieux et excellent. Je tiens d’ailleurs à les remercier pour avoir récupéré ma boucle d’oreille tombée dans l’évier.

author: Sarah K
text: I needed a late night hotel after having issues with my Airbnb, the staff was so helpful and hotel is clean, modern and in a good location. Would recommend.

author: chadia81
text: What a fantastic Hotel! Class class class all the way. From the luxurious breakfast to The extremely comfortable, bad fabulous views incredibly gorgeous shower so clean amazing customer service I had a fabulous experience here book book book.!!!!!

author: Jane Chanda
text: Great experience, it’s beautiful clean and worth it. Very friendly stuff.

author: OLFA ERRAIS
text: Nous avons habité pendant 2 nuits dans ce bel hôtel bien situé. Il est à proximité de la promenade le long de la mer, à proximité du ferry pour le départ pour corfu . Le service est bon : les chambres sont très belles avec vue sur mer avéc toutes les commodités. Le petit déjeuner est copieux et très bon. A recommander sans hésitation

author: Malte Bever
text: Not really helpful service.

author: Kimberly Quesenberry
text: Stayed here one night on our way to Corfu via the ferry. Very nice rooms and we'll appointed. The included breakfast was delicious with way more offerings than we expected. The view from our room was beautiful as well. Lots of shops, restaurants and a beautiful area to walk around the water.

author: Berit Abicht
text:
I had a fantastic stay at Al-Yacht Hotel in Saranda. The hotel is beautifully maintained and clearly run with a lot of care and attention to detail, which made me feel very welcome from the start.

The breakfast buffet was excellent with a great selection, and the staff were incredibly friendly and attentive throughout my stay.

Overall, a truly enjoyable experience – I felt very comfortable and would absolutely recommend this hotel.

author: Magi
text:
L'hôtel est nouveau mais si vous désirez tranquilité prennez un hôtel plus éloigné.
En effet on a été dérangez par des voisins de chambre à plusieurs reprises dans la nuit.
Nous avons demandé à changer de chambre même si nous devions être sous-classe.
Ce qui a été fait mais aucun geste commercial pour compenser cela.
Le déjeuné était ok et la propreté aussi

author: Alex Hajjar
text: Great service, great room

author: tepi9846
text: Nice place and avesome staff

author: koirala prasamsa
text:
We had such a great time staying at Hotel Sarandë — everything about our experience was just lovely. First of all, the location couldn’t be better — it’s right in the heart of the city, super close to the beach, promenade, shops, restaurants and all the main spots, but still quiet and peaceful enough to relax. It was so convenient to get around and explore everything easily.

What made our stay even more special was the amazing service. The staff were so warm, friendly and helpful from the moment we arrived until we checked out — they really made us feel welcome and took great care of us. They were always ready to help with any questions we had, gave us great tips about places to visit and things to do, and made sure everything we needed was taken care of promptly.
We will definitely come back next time we visit Sarandë, and we would absolutely recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a great place to stay — wonderful service, perfect location and great value for money! Thank you so much for your service..😊😊

author: onyinye nnamani
text:
The room was clean and the hotel is in an excellent location. We stayed in a room with a balcony and swimming pool and we enjoyed every moment of our stay.

The breakfast was also very good, with a wide variety of options to choose from. The staff were friendly, welcoming and always willing to help.

They also beautifully decorated the room for my birthday surprise before our arrival on the first night, which made the experience even more special and memorable. Overall, we had a fantastic stay and would gladly return again

author: Dylan Owusu
text: Everything about the hotel was great. Delivered exactly what I expected

author: Tilda Silbermann
text: Vi bodde här under vår semester. Sååå bra!! Allt från service till rum var perfekt. Rekommenderar varmt detta hotell!!

author: Cedric Serdimet
text:
Très belle hôtel avec chambre sur la mer.
Pas loin du port.
Equipe très amicale

author: Simon Ordever
text:
Great family run hotel about 20 minutes walk from the town center and the ferry port.
The breakfast was wonderful, the room basic but spacious, with a lovely balcony with sea view.
10/10 for value for money.
(Edward on reception was very  efficient)

author: GoPlaces11132785762
text: Propre, accueil chaleureux, parking et petit déjeuner copieux

author: sajko xx
text:
The owner very Nice and helpful 🌸🌸
VERY clean and comfy.:) location also good

author: Michel Fanga
text: Alex and his family made us feel at home ! It was the best start for a one week vacation in the region. Waking up with this view….having a Mediterranean breakfast to refuel and start the day : two ingredients for an amazing journey in Sarande ! Stop thinking , just book your next trip !😎

author: Al Vi
text: Preis Leistung ist gut. Frühstück ok. Parkplatz auch vorhanden. Der Chef ist leider nicht sehr sympatisch.

author: Ben Peters
text: Very kind staff. The family works at the hotel and does their best to fullfill your wishes and make u a plesant stay.

author: Paul Rosner
text:
Haxhi is a fantastic place to eat in Saranda. The food is great, the atmosphere is wonderful, and Emmanuel and his staff are friendly, helpful, and kind!  Great place to dine and enjoy a pretty view!

Ate here again tonight. Delicious dinner, attentive service, lovely atmosphere! Emanuel and his family and staff make you feel valued.

Had another fantastic dinner here. We had mushroom risotto,  creamy chicken pasta, and grilled chicken breast. Delcious bread as well! Fine service and friendly staff!

author: Naomy Garcia
text: Absolutely loved this place! The food was excellent and everything we tried was full of flavor and freshly made. The service was just as amazing, the waitresses were incredibly warm, friendly, and welcoming throughout the whole experience. They even offered us complimentary drinks and fruits, which was such a thoughtful gesture and made us feel really appreciated as customers. The view is also beautiful, and the restaurant is located just a few steps from the beach, which makes the whole experience even better. I would definitely recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for great food, outstanding hospitality, and a lovely atmosphere!

author: Tahlia Hensley
text: Fantastic time at Haxhi for dinner - Generous portion, friendly staff (Fatmir went above and beyond) and very well priced. I would highly recommend!

author: Sarah
text:
Ein rundum perfektes Erlebnis! Der Service ist außergewöhnlich freundlich, aufmerksam und gleichzeitig angenehm unaufdringlich, man fühlt sich sofort willkommen.

Hier stimmt wirklich alles: Man fühlt sich wohl, kann abschalten und genießen. Und das Essen? Ganz klar eine 10/10, geschmacklich auf höchstem Niveau, liebevoll angerichtet und absolut überzeugend.

Wer gutes Essen, eine besondere familiäre Atmosphäre und tollen Service sucht, ist hier genau richtig. Absolute Empfehlung!

author: O Musti
text:
Nice restaurant and super friendly staff.
I would recommend the Linguine Frutti di Mare, as it comes with a tasty tomato sauce and seafood.
Fruit for dessert is included on the house.
"Card payments are not possible, though, so bear in mind to have cash."

author: Sandra Templin
text: Leider wurden wir von 3 Kellnern ignoriert und stehen gelassen, als wir an einen freigeräumten Tisch gingen, wurden wir blöd angemacht, wir sollten draußen warten, die anderen (die von der anderen Seite des Restaurants kamen), würden schon länger warten. Uns hat dieser Umgang gar nicht gefallen, wir sind wieder gegangen. Da sind wir von Albanien bisher anderes gewohnt.

author: Linda Haska
text:
Atmosfere interesante. Bukur.
Faleminderit per mikpritjen.
Mario dhe Linda

author: Rosaria Cristiano
text: Wir sind sehr begeistert gewesen.  Alles ist top. Das Lokal,die Liebe zum Detail.  Der Service top. Das Essen ein Traum. Die Aussicht mega. Wir kommen definitiv wieder.

author: Denis Nightrod
text:
Sehr sehr leckeres Essen,Ambiente mal was ganz anderes es passt voll zu dem Besitzer und zu den Angestellten die voll locker,lustig drauf sind!!!!!
Ich kann es nur empfehlen 😉👍

author: Leona D
text: The food, service, atmosphere and attention to detail is fantastic. The portion sizes are very generous and above all the food is very tasty.  The wine is also gorgeous. A lovely suprise at the end of the meal was a complementary fruit platter which was a lovely addition. I would highly recommend this resturant and will defintley be back.

author: Kanishk
text: The resturant was quite as I think we were pretty late in the afternoon. We got placed at a table as soon as we entered. One thing different here was their menu. They had digital menu's which have a picture of every dish available helping you to make a choice easily. I would recommend the crab claws and squid fry which were very delicious.

author: Kari Oransky
text: Overall great dining experience! We had the Greek salad, shrimp pasta, and fish of the day. Everything was delicious, especially the fish of the day which was grilled to perfection.

author: Ouassil ELRHAZAL
text:
We had dinner in Black Marlin and every single dish we ordered was perfectly executed!
Salads are fresh and unboring, Appetizers were delicious and perfect teaser for the main courses which were simply top-notch!
And above all, the whole staff one by one are professional, attentive to details and extremely welcoming and helpful!
See you again for sure.

author: Abin John
text: We are came here for exploring the sea food varieties and it’s very delicious and the service was amazing overall the experience was amazing

author: mahjabeen zubair
text: Great food! Worth the price xx

author: wendell roche
text: This is a restaurant i will really recommend. We had a wonderful time,  have been taking good care of. Service is wonderful. We had agreed time.

author: Cédrik Rochon
text: Great experience in Saranda!

author: Joanna Smyslo
text:
1. Cudowne miejsce🤩przepyszne jedzonko o niepowtarzalnym smaku🙂wszystko okraszone cudowną atmosferą i pięknym uśmiechem obsługi 😍 za każdym razem odwiedzamy to miejsce i serdecznie polecamy 👍
2. Pierwsza opinia sprzed dwóch lat 🙂 obecna (2)🤩dużo dodać i nic ująć. Nowa lokalizacja 👍Nowy lokal👍Klimat bez zmian, wciąż wspaniały. Można już zjeść też obiadek 🤩
Wszystko smakuje i wygląda wspaniale.
Polecam nadal niezmiennie i wciąż 👍

author: Adam Smyslo
text:
Lokal w nowym miejscu bliżej promenady ale smak i obsługa jak zwykle na najwyższym poziomie👍
Miło i przyjemnie 😀
Śniadania, obiady, kawa, ciasta, wino … pierwsza klasa
Polecam odwiedzić to miejsce 😀

author: Michele Rossi
text: I wanted a nice hearty breakfast to start my day of adventures and LuLu Cafe was the perfect stop - especially if you are a cat lover! The service was amazing and the food was even better! They do take credit card (with additional fee). Stop by, have a great meal and get some kitty time!

author: Romain Ren
text:
Le meilleur café de la ville !!!

On y a pris le petit-déjeuner à 2 reprises : c'était excellent à chaque fois. Les produits sont frais et récupérés localement et on sent que les plats sont préparés avec amour et soin.

Les prix sont légèrement au-dessus de la moyenne, mais ils en valent largement la peine au vu de la qualité. Je recommande personnellement les crêpes et les omelettes.

La serveuse est très agréable et accueillante. Une bouteille d'eau est offerte avec chaque petit-déjeuner, très pratique pour les touristes et le café offre chaque jour une boisson fait maison différente.

author: leszek bejmert
text:
Niespodzianka jest taka że do LuLu Cafe nie trzeba już wchodzić pod górkę... Lokal jest teraz w centrum Sarandy i wszędzie jest blisko. Byłem ze ślubną na kawie i podobało nam się tam bardzo.
Wspaniała atmosfera i rozmowa z Magdą która jest właścicielką tego lokalu sprawiła nam przyjemność.
Szczerze polecam.

author: Mała Mi
text: Śniadaniowe pyszności skradły moje serce ❤️ owsianka z owocami to poezja smaku, tosty, omlety, sałatki, ciasto i coś na trawienie + miła pogawędka z rodakami dała efekt WOW. Serdecznie polecam, również na wieczorną kawkę czy drinka 👍

author: Marco Pesucci
text: Il cibo è delizioso, menomale un posto dove fare una colazione variegata e salutare anche fuori casa. Le ragazze al servizio molto gentili. Super consigliato!

author: Luana Vilhena
text: Lovely breakfast and atmosphere

author: Ineta Simkute
text: Everything is perfect, recommend!❤️❤️

author: caleb obulu
text: Loved the service and the seafood linguine was top quality. The server was also great in welcoming us and getting a complimentary cake for my wife's birthday

author: Bárbara Franco
text: Otimo atendimento, comida deliciosa!

author: Maria Christina Stavridou
text: We walked in very late and had a small dinner. Chicken soup was very very good!

author: melona sanchez
text: Muy buena comida y vistas hermosas al mar

author: Esther Gracias
text:
With beautiful view and food is good. Also gimmy was so friendly who served us.
Definitely recommend it

author: Joanna Inwal
text: Delicious food - big portions, amazing service!

author: Geoffrey Coffman
text: Mixed emotions about this restaurant. Food was pretty good. Atmosphere- nice outdoor area but looking a gas station. So we sat inside along the windows. There were some little flies and two other tables actually moved. As for menu, I know it's early in the season but at three items on the menu weren't available. No hard liquor, white win available by glass but red only by bottle.

author: Vilda Schubert
text: Perfekt om man vill testa lite nyfångad seafood, väldigt mysigt ställe lite avlägset iväg från de turistiga! Dock snålade de lite med potatisen men annars är vi väldigt nöjda!

author: Wolfgang Wolff
text:
Wir sind nur auf der Durchreise und waren dadurch nur hier in dieser Taverne die wir sehr gerne weiterempfehlen.
Zu essen gab es einen hochgradig leckeren Salat mit Kräutern danach Goldbrasse und Bass (weiß grad nicht den deutschen Namen) wunderbar gegrillt mit ein paar Kartöffelchen.....sehr sehr lecker.
Der Sohn des Hauses kann übrigens perfekt deutsch - ein Rückkehrer.

author: Nolwenn Gauthier
text: Poisson de la pêche du jour

author: Jhoselyn G
text: Friendly staff and delicious food!

author: Douha Manoubi
text: Une cuisine de très bonne qualité nous avons adoré je recommande 😊

author: Babyna 22
text: Cibo tutto veramente ottimo, prezzi molto onesti, davvero un'ottima esperienza!

author: PrinceKorvin
text: Really nice place and the best seafood, fresh and tasty! Recommend!

author: Ilcia Sato Marrou
text: Comida fresca y deliciosa a precios justos 💛Lugar algo alejado de la zona turística sin embargo vale la pena disfrutar la comida marina , servicio muy bueno y paciente por parte del joven mesero , muy buena experiencia!

author: Lusy Dolia
text:
Наш вечір у Саранда ми завершили в цьому чудовому ресторані і не помилилися. Дякуємо нашій господині на ім'я Алексія за турботу і супровід у цій чудовій подорожі у світ албанських смаків і смаколиків.
Дуже вдячні команді закладу за високу кухню і підтримку албанських звичаїв у всьому: від страв до орнаментів 💛💙

author: J. Rübsamen
text: Ishte cdo gje shume e shijshme. Aleksia

author: Rohit Vinnakota
text: Amazing and very welcoming hotel , our waiter poni was really helpful and wonderful

author: uri paniri
text: הגעתי לאחר צפי בביקורות, לצערי אין קשר בין הביקורות לבין האוכל שמוגש. 14 מאזטים לא טריים, משעממים ברמה של סופרמרקט, דג בגודל של סרדין גדול חסר טעם, צלעות כבש שיותר מזכירות פרגית יבשה, המנות מגיעות קרות ומוכנות מראש. לסיכום אוכל מאכזב מאןד, לא טעים, לא טרי ולא אותנטי במחיר יקר. המקום יפה אבל לא נתן חוויה אוכל טובה.

author: Luca Vitus
text: Delicious food and amazing service! Poni was so friendly and attentive — we had a great experience. Highly recommended!

author: Badr
text: Très bon restaurant, traditionnel et copieux. Et PONI était très gentil et attentionnée

author: Kriols Bilaj
text: Restorant me ushqime teadicionale super.sherbimi nga Poni super

author: Thanas Marku
text: Ushqim shume i mire,,sherbimi nga Poni super

author: Valentina M.
text: The food was very good, we had a lovely stay at the restaurant, also our waitress poni was very welcoming and friendly.

author: Alisa Aa
text: It was really good: the atmosphere, the food and our waitress Poni was really welcoming and friendly. I would totally recommend it! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ and the local cat would love to have a bite 🐱

author: Dashti Taher
text:
It was very good and tasty
Also very good service

author: Auraz Taher
text: Top service, top food, top location🤝

author: Gea Braadslee
text: Heerlijk gegeten, vlotte, vriendelijke bediening en de dames in de keuken hadden veel lol

author: Ella Irhol
text: Alles war sehr gut und die Bedienung war sehr freundlich. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder.

author: Chris Brown
text: Delicious freshly made home cooked food with friendly service. And good value. We'll definitely be back. Thank you!

author: Simón Gomila
text:
Argjiro is a great resturant in Sarande. You can eat seafood and typical Albanian dishes for a cheap price. The atmosphere is calm and you will be beside the sea. Moreover, the service is outstanding and all the waiters and waitress are super attentives and kinds.
I would come back for sure!

author: Kevin Nichiporik
text:
The food here was amazing.  You could tell it was prepared with love.  Fresh ingredients and amazing flavours. Amanda our server was very helpful in our decisions with some recommendations.

Highly recommend eating here if you want to try some traditional Albanian foods.

author: Mariano Pollio
text: Wonderful restaurant to taste local food and wine! Very Kind attention and convenient prices. Don't miss it!

author: Benny Neher
text:
Wer ne ordentliche Portion gegrilltes Fleisch auf dem Teller haben will, sollte hier vorbeischauen😋🤩
Wir waren sehr zufrieden, die Salate sind auch sehr groß🥗
Dessert zum Abschluss gab's aufs Haus 👍

author: Raquel Berrio
text: Platos con mucha cantidad comida buena!

author: Ervin Fregjaj
text: Një vend shumë i këndshëm për të ngrënë drekë apo darkë. Porcionet e mesoreve ishin të mëdha dhe mishi shumë i shijshem. Shërbimi shumë i mirë dhe ambjenti goxha i pastër.

author: Vlada Dymochka
text: Не вау. Но! Салат греческий - это отвал башки! Порция огромная!!! И супер вкусно!! Картошка фри тоже была хороша! Микс из мяса на двоих - норм, но не все мясо было прожарено на 100%. В целом довольны, но могут возникнуть проблемы с оплатой картой

author: Gemma
text: Muy buena la parrillada de pescado y buen precio . Amables y rápidos .

author: Bekki Berry
text: Really good traditional Albanian food. Service was great. Would highly recommend

author: YOLANDA C
text: Fuimos dos noches a cenar, la ensalada griega está buenísima. Las raciones son abundantes, con la ensalada y otro plato de carne comen dos personas de sobra,

author: Samuel Beaupré
text: Portion énorme pour le prix. Excellent rapport/qualité/prix.

author: A A
text: Für uns war der Besuch leider eine große Enttäuschung. Das bestellte Fleischgericht entsprach überhaupt nicht dem, was angekündigt wurde: Essbares Fleisch war kaum vorhanden, stattdessen bestand der Großteil aus Knochen und Fett. Für den Preis und die Erwartung an ein ordentliches Abendessen war das aus unserer Sicht nicht akzeptabel.

author: D. G.
text: Absolut keine Empfehlung. Die bestellte Fleischplatte bestand überwiegend aus Knochen und Fett. Das Essen war insgesamt qualitativ schlecht und dafür völlig überteuert. Ich würde allen empfehlen, ihr Geld lieber woanders auszugeben. Sehr enttäuschende Erfahrung!

author: Daria Odrobińska
text:
Zamówiłam makaron z krewetkami i cukinią- było przepyszne! Jeden z lepszych jakie jadłam, a w Sarandzie najlepsze!
Na koniec dostałam tiramisu w formie gratisu! Super obsługa i klimat miejsca, na uboczu dzięki czemu nie ma tu wielu tłumów!

author: Ms Kara Coach K
text:
Excellent crust baked in a fire pit oven. I had the mushroom pie with a glass of red. Generous pour and dog friendly atmosphere with my little dude🐶
Great vibe and wonderful for people watching and chilling after a day of work or play.
I will be back! 🍕🍷🇦🇱📍🐶🙏

author: Jochen Neffe
text:
Ich habe noch nie in einer Pizzeria mit so lustlosen und desinteressierten Servicekräften gesessen. Das betrifft auch den Pizzabäcker. Die Pizza war gut, der Service unter aller Kanone. Mein freundlicher Rat doch ein wenig freundlicher zu Gästen zu sein, Interesse zu zeigen und zu lächeln wurde mit einem gelangweilten Schulterzucken beantwortet.
So betreibt man keine Gastronomie.
Den Stern gibt es nur für die gute Pizza.

author: Michal Bedkowski
text: Smacznie, miło,przystępne ceny. Polecam

author: Michael Canatuan
text: the food is not good..it so disgusting taste..its not yummy..the Pizza are salty..and the owner are so rude!

author: Jurgen Beqiri
text:
Had an amazing experience at Pizzeri Restaurant Lindi during my vacation in Albania! As someone coming from New York, I take pizza seriously, and I can honestly say this was one of the best pizzas I’ve had in my life. The dough was perfect, the ingredients tasted fresh, and every bite was incredible.

What made the experience even better was the warm hospitality. It’s a family-owned business, and the owners made us feel so welcome from the moment we walked in. You can really feel the passion and care they put into both the food and the atmosphere.

I highly recommend this place to every tourist visiting Albania. If you’re looking for amazing pizza, friendly people, and a memorable dining experience, this is the spot to visit! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇦🇱🇦🇱

author: Linda Lennartsson
text: Utsikten var fantastisk! Häftigt att se variationen  beroende på vart du flyttade blicken! Men det var väldigt blåsigt vilket tog udden av upplevelsen, tyvärr, men det är inget man kan styra. Själva restaurangen var stängd. Synd att man inte kunde ta ett glas/kaffe och njuta av utsikten.

author: Mica Teasdale
text: Absolutely stuningggg, but then again so is EVERYTHING in Albania 😍 The views from the roof top restaurant are to die for. Highly recommended!

author: Ramunė Braciškienė
text: Puiki vieta palydėti saulę ☀️

author: İbrahim Karataş
text: Gün batımı muhteşem 👌

author: Daniela Rebolledo Oliva
text: Fuimos en Abril. Llegamos para ver el atardecer, fuimos en auto, súper cerca del centro de Sarande. Vistas maravillosas hacia Sarande. Recomendado!

author: Payal Amit
text:
Great experience with Albanian Mini Van Tours! I took the tour on Monday, 18th May from Saranda Promenade, and it was absolutely amazing. The tour covered all the famous nearby places, especially the Blue Eye and the castle, which were truly stunning and unforgettable.

Our tour guide was exceptional. He explained everything in detail about Albania’s history, lifestyle, famous places, food culture, and much more. He was knowledgeable, clear in his explanations, very helpful, and always willing to answer questions.

The entire trip was very comfortable, well organized, and excellent value for money. I had an amazing time and also learned a lot about Albania throughout the journey. They also dropped us at the Ksamil bus station on time, which was very convenient.

Highly recommend Albanian Mini Van Tours to anyone visiting the area. A great experience with comfort, learning, and beautiful places all in one tour!

author: Positano Private Drivers
text: Esperienza indimenticabile. Autista disponibile e preparato. Faccio lo stesso mestiere in Italia ma lui è molto più bravo. Consigliatissimo

author: Chris Bell
text: Excellent tour, very informative and learnt a lot about the Albanian history whilst also seeing some amazing views. Well worth it for a very fair price.

author: A DH
text: Albania minivans tours with Ilir offers excellent guiding in a wide range of topics such as culture, language, and history during the tour. Nice modern vans took us to interesting and beautiful sights and there was a nice balance between free time and group time. A lovely day!

author: Anudhi Lok
text: Had a great time exploring some big landmarks; Lekursi Castle, the blue eye, gjirokaster and more! Ilir was the most wonderful guide. He was super friendly, helpful, kind and had lots of knowledge to share on the sites we visited. Highly recommend ⭐️

author: Amber
text: Ilir was such an amazing host. This is such great value for the day out. It was our best experience in Albania. We thought it was just transport but Ilir provides information at each stop, he answers any questions and gives advice about other great attractions for the rest of your stay. I was nervous as had heard driving in Albania can be a bit scary but I was completely wrong and felt safe the whole time- very comfortable minivan. 10/10, would highly recommend.

author: Bruna
text: Ilir was the best guide! He told us many things about Albanian history, he was kind and helpful! 100% recommend his tours! The tour was lovely, places were beautiful, and the views from the drive back were incredible!

author: Leanne Smith
text: We had a wonderful day tour of Lekursi castle, the blue eye and Gjirokaster. The scenery was beautiful and the castle at Gjirokaster is very well preserved. This is also a good place to buy souvenirs and sample traditional Albanian food. We also stopped at other interesting sights of interest along the way. Our guide Ilir was enthusiastic and welcoming. He was a wealth of knowledge and taught us so much about Albanian history. I’d highly recommend this tour

author: Angela Smith
text:
Today we experienced an amazingly informative and enjoyable day tour from Saranda to Lekursi Castle, Blue Eye and Gjirokaster with Ilir from Albania Minivan Tours.
Ilir shared his vast knowledge of Albanian history and local places of importance with enthusiasm and clarity.
We highly recommend Ilir and Albanian Minuvan Tours. Thank you Ilir for a memorable day.

author: Franck D
text: C’est clairement l’adresse incontournable pour les amateurs de glaces à Sarande. Les glaces sont délicieuses, très parfumées et préparées avec des ingrédients de qualité. Il y a un large choix de parfums, ce qui permet à chacun de trouver son bonheur. En plus d’être excellentes, elles sont vraiment abordables, avec des prix très raisonnables pour la qualité proposée. Le personnel est accueillant et l’endroit est parfait pour une pause gourmande après une balade en ville ou au bord de la mer. Je recommande vivement cette adresse à tous ceux qui passent par Sarande.

author: Mackensie Walker
text: Visited this place multiple times during our stay, ice cream and desserts absolutely delicious. Staff are very friendly and very reasonable prices!

author: Karol Nycz
text: Miła obsługa. Ceny atrakcyjne. Trilece, croissanty z nadzieniem, lody, sok ze świeżych pomarańczy… wszystko super. Szkoda że mało miejsca do siedzenia i że brak porcelany - kawka choć dobra to w papierowym kubeczku. Ale warto.

author: Janina Kaissermueller
text:
Super freundliche und hilfsbereite Mitarbeiter.

Das Trilece war Mega lecker… und wir hatten noch ein Zitroneneis was ebenfalls sehr zu empfehlen ist. Generell sah dort alles sehr sehr lecker aus

Kann es wärmstens empfehlen ❤️❤️

author: Morgan Lemelin
text: Pas les glaces du siècle mais le cornet est bon

author: Ibrahim Nass
text: Very kind service, and very delicious trelece. Highly recommended ✌️

author: Мария Коверчик
text: A very nice place with delicious sweets

author: Manon Abud
text: Best Dubai gelato ever!

author: Chrysoula Vita
text: Πολυ ωραιο μερος! Φαγαμε ενα γλυκο το τριλετσε και μασ αρεσε πολυ! Πολυ ευγενικοι ανθρωποι!

author: Flo
text: Location, super bien accueilli par Kevin, prix abordable et surtout pas besoin de carte de crédit. Je recommande vivement.

author: Roy Amin
text: Super nette Leute schnell und ohne Probleme hier hält man sein Wort

author: Anneli Husso
text:
I was on a group tour to Gjirokaster, blue eye and Lekursi. The car was clean and comfortable, driver so amazing that I felt safe even on those narrow roads on mountains. And our tour guide Jona was the best. She knew so much about things, told everything in a interesting way and was very cheerful and bubbly person. And she paid attention to each and everyone.
This was one of the best tours I have ever been. I'd recommend this company and specially Jona in a heartbeat.

author: Omar Aljubouri
text: We rented a car from them, their service is so great and they reply dirctly to all inquiries. They are honest and trustworthy. And the insurance is real and they respect the details of it. Highly recommended and trusted company.

author: De oliveira charlène
text: Excursion avec Leka Tours, avec Jona comme guide. C'était super ! Gjirokaster, blue eye, château de Lekursi, nous en avons pris plein les yeux !! Nous nous sommes senti en sécurité avec le conducteur qui gère avec sécurité les trajets. Et Jona est également une super guide, très gentille, douée et attentionnée... Merci pour cette expérience ❤️

author: Omar Moaz
text: Amazing car rental service. Very kind and great prices, great cars. Rented the Tiguan and the Q7, both amazing drives. Highly recommend!

author: manxhar shena
text: We rent a car in Saranda at Leka Tours &rent a car the car was perfect and the service was excellent

author: Afonso Freitas
text: Perfect rental for Albânia, simple process and very straightforward. The car was good and we enjoyed our vacation there in Albânia wirh it. When i go to Albânia again i will be heading to Leka again 👍👍

author: Hicham Zrirak
text:
J’ai loué une voiture chez Leka Tours pour mon séjour à Saranda. J’ai longtemps cherché une agence de location de confiance et je suis tombé chez eux. Honnêtement j’en suis ravi. Les voitures proposées étaient toutes propres et j’ai clairement vu leur sens professionnel dès mon arrivée.

Si vous souhaitez louer une voiture à Saranda ou à Ksamil. Je vous les conseils les yeux fermés.

Petit plus, leur agence se trouve à deux minutes du port en voiture. Une fois que l’on a déposé le véhicule pour se diriger vers le port, le monsieur nous a proposé de nous amener en voiture gracieusement, chose que l’on a pas refuser avec trois petite valise et un sac à dos. 😅

Merci pour tout 🙏

author: charlotte forny
text:
C’est cool, mais ça ne vaut pas plus que son prix, le personnel est super, malgré le fait qu’il est dit qu’une boisson est offerte et du snorkeling qui nous on pas été proposé.
Mais ça reste globalement une bonne activité

author: Doğa Barın
text: Geçen hafta tura çıktık çok sıcakkanlı insanlardı ve eğlenceliydi ki herkese tavsiye ederim:) üstelik istediğiniz müziği açabilirsiniz 😉

author: Nikos Yfantis
text: Ταξιδέψαμε με το σκάφος της Linas περάσαμε υπέροχα, είδαμε πολλές όμορφες παραλίες και κάναμε και μπάνιο. Το προσωπικό ήταν πολύ ευγενικό και έκανε τα πάντα ώστε να περάσουμε όμορφα. Είμαι πολύ ευγνώμων στη Linas και στην οικογένειά της για αυτή την υπέροχη εμπειρία, την οποία προτείνω σε όλους να τη δοκιμάσουν. 😊

author: Mustapha
text: Très bonne agence qui est à l’écoute et qui fait tout pour vous comprendre , recommande les yeux fermés

author: AIT M'HAND Aboubakr
text: Super prix et accueil très plaisant, à essayé !

author: Team Valor
text: Enjoyed the experience, Esa is a very good person

author: Fjolla Myftiu
text: Amazing experience! Loved that it's a family run business. He was accomdating and friendly! Took us around some beautiful sights.

author: Gresa Kraja
text: You should absolutely book this boat and support this lovely family-run business. They tailor the trip to what you want and make the whole experience feel easy and personal. Their captain has decades of experience at sea, so you feel in very good hands. Highly recommend.

author: Arten Sinani
text: Captain Taulant is the best, beautiful beaches, great time, I recommend it

author: Adela Lazaj
text: The best tour you can have if you are in vacation in saranda. The time spent was lovely and we were well taken care of. I strongly recommend it for everyone. Don't miss the opportunity to have this lovely experience. The staff very lovely everything was a 5 star experience.

author: Jerome Rostand
text:
Wonderfull experience, nice guide, nice views, nice spots
I recommand ;)

author: G.shivaraju 736-325
text: Lewa driving is very good and he helped me to look all the places  of sea by boarding is very good and easy way to guide properly and I love he’s boarding I highly recommended

author: Vishal Raogandra
text: Best experience ever and safe driving loved it

author: Erika Lasinskaite
text: I highly recommend! This was a highlight of our trip, enjoyed it so much. If you get a chance - undoubtedly go and choose El Nino Boat Tours for a great experience

author: nagasai sai
text: This morning I went for a boat ride, but at first there was no boat available. I met one of the staff members and she was very helpful. She did everything she could to arrange a boat ride for me and even gave me a good price. The experience turned out to be amazing and very enjoyable. The boat had a Bluetooth speaker and the sound quality was great, which made the ride even more fun. Thank you for such a wonderful experience!

author: Olta
text: Beautiful experience and wonderful staff🔆🔆

author: Bor
text: Polecam spacer o zachodzie słońca.

author: Alex Sabastia
text:
On ne pourrait pas qualifier la ville de petite perle de l’Adriatique. C'est un peu la pagaille, pas forcément propre, pas forcément pratique, mais la municipalité a tenter de miser sur cette courte promenade en front de mer pour égayer votre séjour sur place. La vue est jolie, l'eau claire même si sa couleur est soutenue par du sable blanc apporté à grand renfort de camions.
Petit souvenir du temps où l'urbanisme n'était pas pensé que pour soutirer de l'argent aux touristes, les restes d'architecture en bord de mer. Peut être byzantines mais il n'y a pas de panneau.

author: Faith 99
text: One of the best places for a walk. Many coffee shops nearby, including restaurants etc

author: Antonia Grabowski
text: Sehr nette und kundige Besitzerin. Sie hat uns beraten wann der beste Zeitpunkt ist, um mit den SUPs aufs Wasser zu gehen. Sie ist auch gemeinsam mit uns rausgefahren und hat uns angeleitet, da wir unerfahren waren. Wir haben uns sehr gut aufgehoben gefühlt und schnell Erfolge erzielt. Die Besitzerin hat uns außerdem Wetbags zur Verfügung gestellt, sodass wir unser Handy mitnehmen & Fotos machen konnten. Danke für diese tolle Erfahrung und die tollen Tipps 💛

author: Paul B
text: War mit meiner Freundin das erste Mal bei nem Paddelboard-Verleih – und es war echt klasse. Die Inhaberin war super nett, total zuvorkommend und echt hilfsbereit. Wir hatten richtig Spaß, obwohl wir beide keine Ahnung hatten. Die Erklärung war top, dann ging’s auch schon los. Können wir wirklich jedem empfehlen, der in Saranda, Albanien, Urlaub macht – egal ob Anfänger oder nicht. Lohnt sich auf jeden Fall! 💯

author: Joanna Czerwinska
text:
Mega przygoda. To były nasze pierwsze kroki na deskach SUP, instruktorka Magda wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczyła i pokazała. Deski okazały się być strzałem w 10 , bawiliśmy się świetnie.
Bardziej dziękujemy Magdzie za miło spędzony czas i cierpliwość. Wrócimy niebawem 🥰

author: Asia Górniak
text: Świetnia wypożyczalnia 😊 Cała organizacja na bardzo wysokim poziomie, sprzęt nowoczesny, zadbany i profesjonalny. Szczególne podziękowania dla Magdy, była przemiła, wszystko dokładnie wytłumaczyła i dała bardzo cenne wskazówki, które nam się przydały, szczególnie, że byliśmy początkujący. Czuliśmy się pewnie i bezpiecznie, a do tego super atmosfera od samego początku! Polecam każdemu, kto chce aktywnie i przyjemnie spędzić czas 💛

author: Armando Kasaj
text: Very good experience,is a must if you come to Saranda.The owner was really nice and helpful.I recommend it!

author: Kamila Janus
text: We go paddling with What's Sup regularly (around every year) and we always have a good time. The host is very professional and friendly, always look after us. Very welcome atmosphere and great equipment. Highly recommended.

author: Sachini Dilka
text: We had an incredible experience kayaking and paddle boarding on our holiday, all thanks to the amazing owner of What’s Sup Saranda.She was friendly, professional. It was definitely a highlight of our trip — highly recommended to anyone looking for a great outdoor adventure!

author: Вера Шевченко
text: We rented SUPs with my sister and absolutely loved it! The boards were in great condition, the staff was friendly, and the experience was amazing. Highly recommend it to anyone visiting!

author: Marian Matuszak
text: What’s SUP Saranda to najlepsze miejsce na kajakową przygodę w Sarandzie! Świetna zabawa pod fachową opieką, a jednocześnie pełne bezpieczeństwo na wodzie. Sprzęt w doskonałym stanie. Saranda widziana od strony morza jest jeszcze piękniejsza – niezapomniane przeżycie! Polecam każdemu!  Pozdrawiam

author: Sohrab Huseynli
text: We wanted to rent paddleboards, but the weather was too windy. The beautiful lady who rents was very kind and helpful 😊— she gave us good advice and suggested we wait for a better day. She was really friendly and professional😊😊 Highly recommended!

author: Benny Neher
text: Hier kann man leckere Drinks genießen und den wunderschönen Ausblick wirken lassen 🍹🍸

author: Anna Rabuñal
text: Buenas vistas,buena música,personal amabilísimo y variedad de cocktails.

author: Ice Hdd
text:
“Një eksperiencë vërtet fantastike! Pa diskutim, bari më i mirë në Sarandë. 🍸✨
Ambienti është i mrekullueshëm dhe koktejet ishin absolutisht të jashtëzakonshme — kreative, origjinale dhe ndër më të mirat që kemi provuar. Një falenderim i veçantë për George, i cili na shërbeu me shumë profesionalizëm dhe mirësjellje gjatë gjithë mbrëmjes. Edhe barmanët meritojnë komplimente të mëdha për krijimet e tyre unike dhe super të shijshme. Do të rikthehemi patjetër!”

author: Florent GOMES
text:
Un excellent moment passé là-bas, recommandé Georges c’est un bon gars !
Gezuar

author: Thomas Massoni
text: Best bar in Saranda! Thanks to George, best servor and advice! Gazouar!!

author: Munira Ali
text: Nice drinks, helpful staff and amazing view. Perfect combination for good evening.

author: Tanyah Martens
text:
Heerlijke cocktails! Tegen heel mooie prijzen.
Personeel ook heel erg vriendelijk.

author: Titi Sinani
text: An amazing cocktail bar with beautiful décor, incredible views, and a fantastic atmosphere. The cocktails are expertly made, full of flavor, and beautifully presented. Great music, great vibes, and an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended!

author: Mackensie Walker
text:
One of the nicest strawberry daiquiris i’ve had! Beautiful views and reasonable prices

Would have kept visiting if they had blankets for when it gets chilly in the evenings

Music was great if you love house/afro house🙌🏻

author: Carmen Fdez Felices
text: Best of drinks in Sarandë

author: carmen pardo
text: best place for drinks in Sarande

author: alice Krs
text: Such a beautiful place to have a drink. The staff is so friendly and welcoming. Mano is the best, and he made some delicious cocktails for us. Such a great man. Dont miss this spot in Saranda! You will have the best view of the city.

author: pablo ayuza
text: Pasamos una espectacular noche de tragos y sisha con amigos. Excelente música y ambiente

author: Facundoamazon
text: Super nice view, good cocktails and great music, super recommend

author: Gonnza Pinel
text: A bar full of good vibes, very friendly and attentive staff, I went several times and everything was always perfect, good music, good drinks and good atmosphere

author: Unzila Vohra
text: What a cool place! Had sheesha and some drinks, amazing vibe and music

author: Anaïs
text: Best place to go for a drink in Saranda. The cocktails are amazing and you will have the best experience there thanks to Romarjo. He’s honestly the best host ever, he always makes sure you have the greatest time and he’s incredibly nice to all the customers. 💛

author: Marc O.
text: Best happy hour we found. Came here twice to begin the night and the view at sunset is fantastic! All drinks are 600 ALL from 17:00-20:00

author: CookSterTV

author: Hariyali aakash Mehta
text:
Best cafe I find in Sarande. I had cold chocolate and avacado tost and matcha latte with vegan sandwich. Its was delicious and yummy
And Chris give us best service
Thank you so much for this good service

author: Kinjal Khatri
text: Breakfast was amazing with the best view. And special thanks to Chris. Best guy✨

author: Dhumil Maniar
text: Great place with a lovely atmosphere and beautiful view. I had a veg sandwich and coffee, and both were really good. The food was fresh, the coffee was nice, and the overall vibe was relaxing. Definitely a good spot to chill and enjoy with friends.    CRIS was amazing ✌🏻 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5 stars for him

author: Kristjana Qoku
text:
This lounge bar is truly beautiful, with a breathtaking and peaceful view that creates the perfect atmosphere to relax and enjoy the moment. The service is excellent, the products and cocktails are high quality, and the staff is incredibly welcoming, friendly, and polite.

The place is very clean, well organized, and highly attractive, making it one of the best spots to spend your time in Saranda. Whether you want to enjoy a delicious cocktail or simply admire the beautiful sunset by the sea, this is the perfect place to be.

I would highly recommend this lounge bar to everyone visiting Sarandë.

author: Emirjon Skendi
text: Very good bar in Saranda, perfect view

author: Mirjam Fischer
text: Beautiful beach. It's private and attached to a beach club/hotel. But it's free to use and the sun beds are free, too. The waiters are attentive but not pushy for you to order anything, even if using the sun beds. Absolutely recommend

author: Lavdim Koshutova
text: Amazing place with amazing staf as Ela

author: Dan Mccarthy
text: Really lovely pizza and excellent service from Ella at the Mucobega beach bar :-) so friendly and helpful ❤️

author: Siry Boglárka

author: Remi CUVELIER
text: Belle plage avec eau turquoise

author: Hugh Campbell
text: We loved the place it was 5 star paradise Sarandë,everything 10/10 🙏🙏🙏 Big mentions for the super staff and of course Ella,she loves a hug 😎🇮🇪🇦🇱 Pure Class

author: vana serjian
text:
One of the best beaches here in Sarandë
White sand , crystal clear water, friendly staff
Visited in May it wasn't crowded so we were able to find sunbeds in frontline.

author: Chandan Suar
text: It's a beautiful beach

author: Cemal Eren
text:
We had an amazing time at Mucobega Beach. The sea is crystal clear with an incredible turquoise color.Absolutely beautiful and perfect for relaxing.

A special thank you to Ela, who was extremely kind, helpful, and welcoming to us throughout the day. She made us feel very comfortable and took great care of everything with a smile. Staff like her truly make the experience unforgettable.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Sarande!

author: Ragmi Jusufi

Je recommande vivement cet endroit sans hésitation, une très bonne adresse pour profiter d’un bon verre entre amis.

author: Emilia Barton

Nice service and nice views
Good price and good music
I recommand

author: Jordie Maule

author: Amber Griffin

author: Chucky B
text: I thought the place was closed but messaged the owner and he opened it up for the Liverpool match. I really had a good time and would highly recommend it to anyone who loves sports. They also have a ping pong table which was fun!

author: Mathu Cls
text: Super moment au Juventus Bar : nous sommes venus voir le match PSG – Bayern et l’ambiance était au top dans un cadre idéal. Le personnel est très agréable, parfait pour profiter d’un match entre amis !

author: Chris Rainford
text: Ideal sports bar to watch sports, including Premier League. Multiple large screens with different sports on offer and friendly service

author: Quique Mandado
text: Absolutely amazing viewing experience, would 100% recommend if you have a important match to watch

author: Adan Cabal
text: Cinema level screen, amazing to watch sports and the staff is SO SO CHILL + theres a super cute deaf cat 🐈 💯

author: emeline agussol
text: Excellente adresse ! Joni est super accueillant et chaleureux. Les cocktails et le petit dej étaient excellents. Si je reviens en Albanie, j’y repasserai à coup sûr 😊

author: Fairuz Bass
text: The owner is so nice and has good recommandations. The place is welcoming and the food is awesome. Thank you joni we’ll come back

author: Chedine Rekik
text: Le patron est très accueillant , merci à lui

text:
Le patron un sucre
Très serviable

author: Marie ProutProut

Bar sympa face a la mer
Ambiance Elvis

author: amelie knight
text:
Our favourite bar!
The vibe is unbeatable and amazing quality drinks for the price, we came 3 nights in a row and already feel like family🥰

author: lucy johnson
text: We spent 3 nights in a row here. Amazing hospitality, lovely place and vibe. The lady behind the bar is so sweet and kind, this place deserves all the business they recieve❤️❤️❤️(delish margaritas too for 500!! so cheap

author: Renaud Turny
text: It’s the best bar I nerver see

author: Apostolos Stergiadis
text:
Ωραίο μπαρ υπέροχη ατμόσφαιρα με πολύ καλή εξυπηρέτηση!
Ο ιδιοκτήτης του μπας ο Ορέστης, ένας ευχάριστος τύπος με άψογα ελληνικά. Έχει ζήσει πολλά χρόνια στην Κέρκυρα και είναι πολύ φιλικός, ευχαριστούμε!
Έχει πολύ ωραία rock and roll μουσική!

author: Manish Joshi
text: Alamzing service, great cocktails, good music.. Highly recommended.

author: Valentine Chandezon
text: Vraiment super sympa et leur "Ice Coffe" est très bon ! La déco est magnifique avec une super ambiance "Elvis", de la bonne musique et avec une très belle vue sur la mer ! Le gérant et sa maman sont très accueillant, je recommande chaudement !

author: Bailey Hein
text: Great service and very kind owner. The coffee and orange juice was delicious and they had oat, soy and almond milk available. Good WiFi too!

author: Amit Khandelwal
text: Cute little cafe with warm service

author: Anton Herrmann
text: People who own this place have truly big hearts and care so much to make you have a good exp. Everything i have tried is amazing. This is a pearl!

author: Lars Mikuta
text: Best breakfast in town, coffee excellent and let's not forget Danny's Raki 😁 We loved it thank you Danny and staff 👍👍👍👍👍👍

author: Oliver
text: Best breakfast in town. Super friendly staff, amazing food and good coffee. All very good value. Feta omelette is especially good. Good vegetarian options.

author: Ka
text: Wir hatten das Omelette mit Feta und das albanische Frühstück, war alles sehr lecker und frisch 😊 Brot war auch fantastisch gut! Der nette Besitzer war auch äußerst freundlich und hat uns kleine süße Glückkekszettel geschenkt. Wir kommen als Truppe sehr gerne wieder.

author: Kevin Ramberg
text: Nous sommes venus par hasard prendre 2 thés froids, ils étaient vraiment bons, le patron vraiment très gentil et accueillant 👍 merci

author: Morgan Lemelin
text: très gentil et le chocolat chaud est très bon!

author: Hani Taher
text: Good food, nice staff! Did not ask for me to write a review, so that is why iam leaving an Honest review. The brunch was good, price quality was good and the waiter was next level nice! He knows how to treat customers and ask the right questions. 1 critical point is that i wish they had more places outside.

author: Mateusz Rusyn
text: Great sandwich, good service, huge recommendation for breakfast

author: Adrian Kotkowski
text: Best breakfast in Albania

author: Bash Oshiafi
text: Great service. Very quick and responsive waiting. I recommend

author: Alina Gounina
text: Very tasty and great atmosphere! Good for a rainy day as well 👍

author: Mackensie Walker
text: We ordered the chicken and waffles with oat milk freddo cappuccino and both were delicious! A lovely little brunch spot and great to support a small local business.

author: Theresa Anderson
text: Really good Flat White with Oatmilk, made with lots of love and the food was also really nice. They also have oatmeal with plantbased milk 😃

author: The Astonishing Kyle Jackson
text: The breakfast was amazing. I order the crepes with a mushroom and chicken sauce and the breakfast utterly spectacular all for a low price. And the items on the menu made me want to stick around for lunch and dinner! Great low prices in the heart of the city center of Saranda. I highly recommend Zum Cafè!

author: Aman Sood
text: Go to breakfast place while here in Albania, really accommodating for allergies and intolerances

author: May F.
text: Albanian coffee ! Super !

author: Richard Andhika
text: We come here before we have to leave for Saranda, very good coffie and very nice owner.

author: Ben Graham
text: Lovely staff, delicious coffee!

author: Giovanna Mece
text: Great coffee, fast service, and a nice place to sit and unwind. Loved the overall experience—will definitely come back!

author: Mounira Lamine
text:
Amazing juice and very friendly owner
Will definetely come back

It may be saying it’s closed but it’s open just come guys !!

author: tedi papadatos
text: Arjan is the best! Best coffee in town and the best prices too!

author: Audrey Lo
text: The best coffee in Saranda!

author: Anxhela Xhafaj
text: Nje  ushqim   mbreslenes  pamja super sherbimi10/10 faleminderit bar cafe relax🤍

author: Digital Nomad
text: Cafe Bar Relax is an absolute gem! From the moment you arrive, you're treated to one of the most stunning views around—open, beautiful, and incredibly relaxing, whether by day or at sunset. The food is even better: fresh, flavorful, generously portioned, and beautifully presented, with every dish we tried exceeding expectations. Paired with warm, attentive, and genuinely friendly service that made us feel right at home, it’s the perfect spot to unwind and enjoy great meals. If you’re looking for outstanding food, excellent service, and a fantastic atmosphere, Cafe Bar Relax is a must-visit—we’ll definitely be back soon! Highly recommended!

author: Miriam
text: Very good coffee, fair priced, amazing view. Also they have turtles!

author: Elton Sinani
text: The best place for relaxing. I recommend 10/10

author: Sophie Jones
text: Amazing food and fantastic service. Staff are so lovely. Would definitely come again for breakfast

author: Amy O Mahony
text: Such a nice bar, food and service was great.

author: Artem Pokalchuk
text: Дуже смачно і ось ціни

author: Sabrina Cela
text: Siamo stati una mattina per fare una colazione tipica Albanese, bar aperto da poco ma molto molto preparati, servizio impeccabile prezzi molto onesti per tutto quello che abbiamo mangiato. La signora parlava anche l'italiano è stata veramente molto accogliente. Da ritornare sicuramente.

author: Анастасія Єльцова
text: The place where the best coffee (cappuccino and Americano) and cocktails are served😍😍😍

author: Pavlo Overchenko
text: Very good. We went to this bar for over a week and I can say that it was very high quality, everything was top notch. We were very satisfied.

author: Altin Gjini

author: Mariia Krysevych
text: Friendly staff, generous portions, and delicious food! Highly recommend for breakfast or brunch

author: ioana bozhori
text: The pastries were fresh and delicious, and the staff was very kind. The place was clean and cozy. I would definitely come back again!

author: Kristi Bozhori
text: An absolutely wonderful place! Everything we tried was super fresh and delicious. The coffee is excellent, and the pastries and baked goods are next level. The service was very welcoming, and the atmosphere makes you feel right at home. Will definitely be back! Highly recommended.

author: soren spata
text: Super fresh products a very pleasant atmosphere and excellent service. The coffee and pastries are fantastic. Highly recommend this place!🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟😍

author: Francine Richard-chevallier
text: Les pâtisseries sont délicieuse . Du bonheur sucré et salé. On peut manger sur place . Et même boire un petit café avec . Je recommande cet pâtisserie. Et les prix sont raisonnable. 😊😊

author: J R
text: Good pastries and very nice staff. Plus the young girl speaks fluent English. And they take credit card!

author: Christine Rosenthal
text:
Landestypisches kleines Café (Bäckerei) mit sehr freundlichem und aufmerksamen Personal.  Da eine große Auswahl an frischen Broten und Leckereien vorhanden sind, wird jeder fündig.
Das Café ist etwas abseits der Hauptstraße,  was sehr angenehm ist.
2 Tische mit 2 bzw. 3 Stühlen sind vor dem Café aufgestellt, drinnen sind etwas mehr an Sitzgelegenheiten zu finden.
Eine klare Empfehlung meinerseits.

author: Wat Wat
text: Très bon moment , le Boss est au top et il sert aussi des cakes fait par sa Maman qui sont très très bon

author: Audrey
text:
Authentique, le patron super sympa, il n'a pas hésité à discuter  avec nous et nous donner plein de bonnes adresses malgré la barrière de la langue.
N'hésitez pas à prendre un bout de gâteau c'est préparé par sa mère.
Super moment partagé dans ce café

author: Diana T. Patane
text: Happy to have found this place open on a Sunday morning. The chocolate donuts were very nice and fresh, same as the freddo cappuccino (iced). Good prices and very welcoming and friendly owner. Highly recommend it :)

author: Joe Johnson
text: Great coffee & great iced Matcha.

author: rene oldenburg
text: Sehr leckerer Kaffee und sehr nette Bedienung! Gerne wieder.

author: agnieszka y
text: Świetne klimatyczne miejsce z dobrymi tostami i kawą

author: Kuba
text:
Wonderful place, freddo cappucino is SO good, but better ask for sweet rather than medium sweet if you’re not a really big fan of coffee.

Toasts and donuts were also good so this is a great place for breakfast.

author: Rania Khaled
text: Super friendly people and great tea. Absolutely recommended

author: Nickt Esla
text: If you want to start your day with an excellent expresso and and a warm welcoming, that is the place you must.

author: Kirilas Sanikovas
text: finally some good coffee in Saranda & for the best price in town aswell. Underrated

author: Ali Fares-Boulos
text: Great coffee and a cozy atmosphere to sit and chat over coffee.

author: Andrea Principe

author: Julia

author: Doris Gomes van der Hoek

author: Ahmet Olcay Akman
text: Kıvırcık saçlı garson tek kelime ingilizce bilmiyor. Servis nedir bilmiyor. Bence arnavutça da bilmiyor. Garip bi insan bu nedir yav.

author: I S
text: What should i tell about , the perfect coffee ? the fast service ? nice music ? or the warm and beautiful ambience and interior ? To note: they also turn on the ac and it is super comfortable , for me ,almost as a regular client each summer season , MY TIME feels like home , if are wondering for an you enjoyable time , here is the place !! It’s such a VIBE !

author: Anaïs
text: Claudio and the team are very welcoming with good vibes and nice ambiance…also pretty good Dj! It’s a perfect place if you want to dance or also chill and enjoy a cocktail or a good beer. One of my fav in Saranda :)

author: Schlin3
text: Redi ist the best, the service is really good here. The drinks are tasty and the view ist the best.

author: Anne Blaeser
text: Super nettes Personal, sehr zuvorkommend und tolles Ambiente.

author: Unzila Vohra
text: Loved the vibe! Amazing place and great music❤️☺️

author: Silke Schöddert (Sdd)
text: Die Aussicht und der DJ waren gut, die Bedienung eher desinteressiert und die Cocktails sind wirklich schlecht zu überhöhten Preisen. Es wird mehr abgerechnet als auf der Karte steht und das Trinkgeld zieht die Bedienung einfach selbst vom Wechselgeld ab. Keine Empfehlung

author: sara bushati
text: great place amazinggggg

author: Dea Mullahaj
text: stafi shume i sjellshem , pijet shumm yummy 😋

author: Zeki Taşdemir
text:
Tirana Kalesi’nin içinde yer alan Oping’s, hem konumu hem de atmosferiyle şehrin en keyifli duraklarından biri. Tarihi dokunun içinde modern ve canlı bir ortam sunuyor.
Menüde kahvaltıdan burgerlere, salatalardan atıştırmalıklara kadar geniş seçenekler var ve genel olarak lezzetler beklentiyi karşılıyor. Kokteyller de oldukça başarılı. Fiyatlar lokasyona göre biraz yüksek sayılabilir ama ortam ve deneyim bunu büyük ölçüde telafi ediyor.
Servis çoğu zaman hızlı ve personel güler yüzlü. Özellikle yoğun saatlerde biraz bekleme olsa da çalışanların ilgisi iyi.
Genel olarak hem gündüz kahvesi hem de akşam keyifli vakit geçirmek için Tirana’da kesinlikle uğranması gereken, enerjisi yüksek bir mekan.

author: Jul Saraçi
text: Mellisa is a great host, I fully recommend this Place

author: sara muca
text: Best place in Tirana, Melisa is a fantastic host, she is very nice and kind.100% recomended.

author: Kristjan Careri
text: Nice place in Tirana, Melisa was a great host for the evening. Fully recommend it

author: Ergisa Rrapaj
text: Amazing service! Melisa was fantastic and took great care of us

author: Kristina Menko
text: Melisa ❤️ me e mira Top

author: Steve C
text: I'm from USA and this place is The Place. Not trying to be glitzy..Just has a strong and comforting nostalgia vibe. There's a separate cool patio for smokers. The music is so cool...curated by a dj and not the usual stuff. It sits in the background. Try this place and say hi to Red the owner who worked in the industry in Italy before coming home to Tirana. Remember when I said this is The Place? Yeah.

author: Eslem ALTINTAŞ

author: Verena Bach
text: Sehr süße Bar, tolles Ambiente! Zu essen hatten wir nichts, aber tolle Stimmung und netter „Innenhof“

author: Ana
text: Really nice place with interesting interior. The cocktails are tasty and the food is delicious. However, the music was too loud and almost impossible to have a conversation.

author: Manuel Lopez
text: Super bar dans ce quartier si significatif. Bon moment passé

author: Jani Juhola
text: Best atmosphere in Tirana 👌

text:
Fantastic shisha experience, very high quality!!
Could you tell me the brand of shisha you use?
Thank you for your reply.

text:
What a fantastic hidden gem! This bar is cleverly disguised as a camera shop — such a fun concept. We felt very welcomed right away and easily got seats at the bar. It’s not too big, which gives it a lovely intimate vibe, perfect for chatting with the bartenders.
The service was mostly excellent. One waitress wasn’t very helpful when I asked for recommendations (she just told me to look at the menu), but the bartender more than made up for it. He listened to what I usually like, suggested a twist on a margarita — and it was excellent! I also had one of the best martinis I’ve ever had — it completely blew me away.
The atmosphere is spot on: great music at the perfect volume for conversation, stylish decor, and very clean bathrooms.
Highly recommend this place for cocktails and that special speakeasy feel. We’ll definitely be back!

author: Irene_mx29
text:
Boudou Bar

Ce bar m’avait été conseillé lorsque j’ai demandé un lieu avec beaucoup de charme et d’authenticité.

En arrivant, on aperçoit de loin les lumières rouges qui éclairent le lieu, ainsi que deux énormes statues rouges, un peu comme les gardiennes de l’entrée.

Sur la terrasse, un groupe de jeunes Français avec leurs sacs à dos et une table remplie simplement de sodas. À l’intérieur : une atmosphère totalement bohème, une scène avec des instruments… mais sans musiciens ce soir-là.

Le propriétaire, avec ses dreadlocks presque jusqu’aux pieds, était extrêmement gentil. Il m’a servi un micro-rhum — en vérité, c’était la fin de la bouteille et il n’a pas voulu ouvrir une autre bouteille juste pour moi 😄 Donc j’ai bu un micro-rhum.

Mais ce n’est pas grave, parce que ce lieu m’a tellement inspirée qu’il deviendra probablement le décor d’une scène de mon film.

Merci à eux pour leur gentillesse et leur compréhension, parce que je suis restée très tard, alors que le bar était déjà fermé, et personne ne m’a dérangée.

Comme partout à Tirana : personne ne t’embête. Et ça, c’est génial.

J’aime Tirana ❤️

author: Brandon Marquez
text:
Hana Corner Cafe is truly one of Tirana’s gems. From the moment you walk in, the atmosphere feels vibrant, welcoming, and full of life. It has a creative, cozy energy that makes it just as perfect for brunch with friends as it is for a coffee break, a casual drink, or a relaxed afternoon out. I also really appreciate that it is a genuinely queer friendly space, which adds to the overall feeling of comfort and inclusivity.

Their drink menu is one of the highlights. They offer a great range of craft drinks, from well made coffee to creative cocktails, so it works beautifully whether you are starting your day or easing into the evening. The daily brunch menu has also been recently updated, and the added variety really shows. There are thoughtful options for different tastes and dietary restrictions, which makes it easy to recommend to almost anyone.

The staff are consistently amazing. Everyone I have interacted with has been kind, helpful, and welcoming. They are happy to answer questions, make recommendations, and make the whole experience feel easy and enjoyable.

A helpful note for visitors: Hana Corner Cafe is cash only. If you need an ATM, the staff can point you to one nearby. Paying in Lek is the better option since the Euro conversion is not ideal, but they do accept Euro when needed, which is still a nice plus.

Overall, Hana Corner Cafe is a warm, colorful, inclusive spot with great drinks, delicious brunch, and genuinely wonderful people. It is the kind of place that quickly becomes a favorite, and I would happily recommend it to anyone looking for a special cafe experience in Tirana. Easily 5 stars.
